  { min:0,   max:0,   label:"No Streak",  color:"#9ca3af", glow:"#6b7280", gradient:["#4b5563","#9ca3af"] },
  { min:1,   max:2,   label:"Sparkling",  color:"#38bdf8", glow:"#0ea5e9", gradient:["#0369a1","#7dd3fc"] },

  { min:365, max:Infinity, label:"Eternal", color:"#facc15", glow:"#eab308", gradient:["#a16207","#fef08a"] },
];
const getLevel = s => STREAK_LEVELS.find(l=>s>=l.min&&s<=l.max)||STREAK_LEVELS[0];

const MILESTONES = [1,3,7,14,30,50,100,365,500,1000];
const MAX_FREEZES = 5;

// ── STREAK FREEZE LOGIC ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Shared by every path that can advance the streak (normal bump, emergency bump)
// so the freeze-consumption rule lives in exactly one place.
//
// Rule: if the user's last bump was more than 1 day ago (i.e. they missed at
// least one full day) and they have a freeze available, consume ONE freeze and
// treat it as if they hadn't missed a day — the streak continues rather than
// resetting to 1. If more than one day was missed, a single freeze still only
// covers a one-day gap (consistent with "consumed whenever the user misses a
// day" — multiple missed days beyond that still break the streak).
function computeStreakUpdate(stats, todayKey, yestKey) {
  const bumpedToday = stats.lastBumpDay === todayKey;
  const freezesAvailable = stats.freezes ?? MAX_FREEZES;

  if (bumpedToday) {
    // Already bumped today — no streak/freeze change, just another bump.
    return { newStreak: stats.streak, newFreezes: freezesAvailable, freezeUsed: false, milestoneHit: null };
  }

  let newStreak;
  let newFreezes = freezesAvailable;
  let freezeUsed = false;

  if (stats.lastBumpDay === yestKey || stats.lastBumpDay === null) {
    // Continuous — bumped yesterday (or this is the very first bump ever).
    newStreak = stats.lastBumpDay === null ? 1 : stats.streak + 1;
  } else {
    // Missed at least one day. Try to protect with a freeze.
    if (freezesAvailable > 0) {
      newFreezes = freezesAvailable - 1;
      freezeUsed = true;
      newStreak = stats.streak + 1; // streak continues as if the gap didn't happen
    } else {
      newStreak = 1; // no freeze left — streak resets
    }
  }

  const milestoneHit = MILESTONES.includes(newStreak) && !bumpedToday ? newStreak : null;
  return { newStreak, newFreezes, freezeUsed, milestoneHit };
}

  { id:"first",   name:"First Bump",        desc:"Your very first paw connection.",       tier:"bronze",   req:s=>s.totalBumps>=1,    progress:s=>[Math.min(s.totalBumps,1),1] },

  { id:"fivehundred", name:"High Five Hundred", desc:"500 total bumps. Incredible dedication.", tier:"platinum", req:s=>s.totalBumps>=500, progress:s=>[Math.min(s.totalBumps,500),500] },
  { id:"perfectweek", name:"Perfect Week",   desc:"All 7 days bumped this week.",           tier:"silver",   req:s=>s.weekBumps>=7,     progress:s=>[Math.min(s.weekBumps,7),7] },
  { id:"comeback", name:"The Comeback",      desc:"Beat your previous best streak.",       tier:"gold",     req:s=>s.streak>0 && s.bestStreak>0 && s.streak>=s.bestStreak && s.bestStreak>=7, progress:s=>[Math.min(s.streak,s.bestStreak||7),Math.max(s.bestStreak,7)] },
  { id:"emerg",   name:"Emergency Survivor", desc:"Used the emergency bump.",              tier:"bronze",   req:s=>s.usedEmergency,    progress:s=>[s.usedEmergency?1:0,1] },
  { id:"coolhead", name:"Cool Under Pressure", desc:"Used a streak freeze to protect your progress.", tier:"silver", req:s=>s.freezes!==undefined && s.freezes<MAX_FREEZES, progress:s=>[MAX_FREEZES-(s.freezes??MAX_FREEZES),1] },
  { id:"iceking", name:"Ice King",          desc:"Used all 5 streak freezes over time.",  tier:"gold",     req:s=>(s.freezesUsedTotal||0)>=5, progress:s=>[Math.min(s.freezesUsedTotal||0,5),5] },
  { id:"year",    name:"One Year Together",  desc:"365 day streak. You're eternal.",       tier:"platinum", req:s=>s.streak>=365,      progress:s=>[Math.min(s.streak,365),365] },
  { id:"kilo",    name:"Thousand Paws",      desc:"1000 total bumps. You are the legend.", tier:"platinum", req:s=>s.totalBumps>=1000, progress:s=>[Math.min(s.totalBumps,1000),1000] },
];

// ── HAPTICS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// ── MOTION SYSTEM — named easing curves matching iOS's real motion physics ──
// Apple's UIKit/SwiftUI curves, ported to CSS cubic-bezier. Using these
// consistently (instead of generic "ease") is most of what makes an interface
// feel physically real rather than just "animated."
const EASE = {
  standard:  "cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)",     // iOS default — most transitions
  decelerate:"cubic-bezier(0.05, 0.7, 0.1, 1)",  // entrances — fast start, gentle stop
  accelerate:"cubic-bezier(0.3, 0, 1, 1)",       // exits — gentle start, fast stop
  spring:    "cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)",// overshoot bounce — playful pops
  springSoft:"cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)",   // gentle settle — panel drags, sheets
  snappy:    "cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)",    // quick, confident — button feedback
};

// Reads the current haptics preference directly from storage since `haptic` is a
// module-level object (can't use React state/hooks) but still needs to respect
// the Settings toggle in real time.
function hapticsEnabled() {
  try { const v = localStorage.getItem("fp16_haptics"); return v === null ? true : JSON.parse(v); }
  catch { return true; }
}
const haptic = {
  light:   ()=>{ if(!hapticsEnabled())return; try{ navigator.vibrate?.(30); }catch{} },
  medium:  ()=>{ if(!hapticsEnabled())return; try{ navigator.vibrate?.(60); }catch{} },
  heavy:   ()=>{ if(!hapticsEnabled())return; try{ navigator.vibrate?.(120); }catch{} },
  bump:    ()=>{ if(!hapticsEnabled())return; try{ navigator.vibrate?.([40,20,80]); }catch{} },
  success: ()=>{ if(!hapticsEnabled())return; try{ navigator.vibrate?.([30,10,30,10,60]); }catch{} },
  emergency:()=>{ if(!hapticsEnabled())return; try{ navigator.vibrate?.([80,30,80,30,200]); }catch{} },
  milestone:()=>{ if(!hapticsEnabled())return; try{ navigator.vibrate?.([40,20,40,20,40,20,200]); }catch{} },
  swipe:   ()=>{ if(!hapticsEnabled())return; try{ navigator.vibrate?.(15); }catch{} },
};

// ── FLAME EMOJI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Renders the 🔥 emoji to an offscreen canvas, then uses source-in compositing
// to fill EVERY opaque pixel of the glyph with the level's gradient — full
// coverage, not just a hue/blend tint. Falls back to plain emoji while loading.
const _flameCanvasCache = {};
function FlameCanvas({ size, c1, c2, cacheKey }) {
  const canvasRef = useRef(null);
  const [ready, setReady] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const px = Math.round(size * 3); // render at 3x for crisp scaling
    const cached = _flameCanvasCache[cacheKey + "_" + px];
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    canvas.width = px; canvas.height = px;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

    const draw = () => {
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, px, px);
      // 1. draw the emoji glyph (provides the alpha mask / shape)
      ctx.font = `${Math.round(px*0.82)}px "Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Noto Color Emoji",sans-serif`;
      ctx.textAlign = "center";
      ctx.textBaseline = "middle";
      ctx.fillText("🔥", px/2, px/2 + px*0.03);
      // 2. composite: only paint over pixels where the glyph already has alpha
      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = "source-in";
      const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, px, 0, 0); // bottom(c1) -> top(c2)
      grad.addColorStop(0, c1);
      grad.addColorStop(0.55, c2);
      grad.addColorStop(1, "#ffffff");
      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, px, px);
      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = "source-over";
      setReady(true);
    };
    draw();
  }, [size, c1, c2, cacheKey]);

  return (
    <canvas
      ref={canvasRef}
      style={{ width: size, height: size, display: "block", opacity: ready ? 1 : 0, transition: "opacity 0.2s" }}
    />
  );
}

const Flame = ({size=22, level}) => {
  const lv = level || STREAK_LEVELS[0];
  const [c1, c2] = lv.gradient; // c1 = base/darker, c2 = tip/brighter
  return (
    <span style={{
      display:"inline-flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"center",
      width:size, height:size, position:"relative",
      filter:`drop-shadow(0 0 ${Math.round(size*0.4)}px ${lv.glow}cc)`,
      transition:"filter 0.4s ease",
    }}>
      <FlameCanvas size={size} c1={c1} c2={c2} cacheKey={lv.label}/>
    </span>
  );
};

// ── AUDIO ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function soundEnabled() {
  try { const v = localStorage.getItem("fp16_sound"); return v === null ? true : JSON.parse(v); }
  catch { return true; }
}
function buildAudio() {
  let ctx = null;
  const gc = () => { if(!ctx) ctx=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(); if(ctx.state==="suspended") ctx.resume(); return ctx; };
  const tone = (f,t,dur,vol=0.28,atk=0.01) => { if(!soundEnabled())return; try { const c=gc(),o=c.createOscillator(),g=c.createGain(); o.connect(g);g.connect(c.destination); o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,c.currentTime); g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,c.currentTime);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(vol,c.currentTime+atk);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,c.currentTime+dur); o.start();o.stop(c.currentTime+dur); }catch{} };
  const meow=(base=600)=>{ if(!soundEnabled())return; try{const c=gc(),o=c.createOscillator(),g=c.createGain();o.connect(g);g.connect(c.destination);o.type="sine";o.frequency.setValueAtTime(base,c.currentTime);o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(base*1.6,c.currentTime+0.12);o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(base*0.8,c.currentTime+0.42);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,c.currentTime);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.28,c.currentTime+0.04);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,c.currentTime+0.48);o.start();o.stop(c.currentTime+0.5);}catch{} };
  return {
    bump:()=>{ tone(280,"sine",0.07,0.35);setTimeout(()=>tone(480,"sine",0.1,0.25),55);setTimeout(()=>{tone(523,"sine",0.35,0.18);tone(659,"sine",0.35,0.14);tone(784,"sine",0.35,0.12);},110); },
    meow:()=>meow(580+Math.random()*80),
    meow2:()=>meow(720+Math.random()*60),
    chirp:()=>{ for(let i=0;i<3;i++) setTimeout(()=>tone(1100+i*180,"square",0.055,0.07),i*65); },
    purr:()=>{ for(let i=0;i<10;i++) setTimeout(()=>tone(75+Math.sin(i)*10,"sawtooth",0.11,0.055),i*110); },
    milestone:()=>{ [261,329,392,523,659,784,1046].forEach((f,i)=>setTimeout(()=>tone(f,"sine",0.28,0.22),i*75)); },
    emergency:()=>{ tone(200,"sawtooth",0.09,0.28);setTimeout(()=>tone(160,"sawtooth",0.09,0.28),95);setTimeout(()=>{tone(261,"sine",0.55,0.18);tone(329,"sine",0.55,0.15);},200);setTimeout(()=>{tone(392,"sine",0.45,0.16);tone(494,"sine",0.45,0.13);},500); },
    achievement:()=>{ [523,659,784,1046].forEach((f,i)=>setTimeout(()=>tone(f,"sine",0.22,0.18),i*90)); },
    swipe:()=>tone(400,"sine",0.06,0.1),
    click:()=>tone(800,"sine",0.04,0.08,0.002),
  };
}

// ── STORAGE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function useLS(key,init) {
  const [v,setV]=useState(()=>{try{const s=localStorage.getItem(key);return s?JSON.parse(s):init;}catch{return init;}});
  const set=useCallback(fn=>{setV(prev=>{const next=typeof fn==="function"?fn(prev):fn;try{localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(next));}catch{}return next;});},[ key]);
  return [v,set];
}

// ── PRESSABLE BUTTON — haptic + scale feedback ─────────────────────────────
function PressBtn({onClick,style,children,hapticType="light",disabled=false}) {
  const [pressed,setPressed]=useState(false);
  const au=useRef(null);
  const firedRef=useRef(false); // prevents double-fire from touch + synthetic mouse events
  useEffect(()=>{au.current=buildAudio();},[]);

  const doPress=()=>{ if(disabled) return; setPressed(true); haptic[hapticType]?.(); au.current?.click(); };
  const doRelease=(e)=>{
    setPressed(false);
    if(disabled||!onClick) return;
    if(firedRef.current) return; // touch already fired it, ignore the trailing synthetic mouse event
    firedRef.current=true;
    onClick(e);
    setTimeout(()=>{firedRef.current=false;},400);
  };
  const cancelPress=()=>setPressed(false);

  return (
    <div
      onTouchStart={e=>{ doPress(); }}
      onTouchEnd={e=>{ e.preventDefault(); doRelease(e); }}
      onTouchCancel={cancelPress}
      onMouseDown={doPress}
      onMouseUp={doRelease}
      onMouseLeave={cancelPress}
      onClick={e=>{ /* swallow native click — handled via touch/mouse up above to avoid double fire */ }}
      style={{
        ...style,
        transform:pressed?"scale(0.955)":"scale(1)",
        filter:pressed?"brightness(0.92)":"brightness(1)",
        transition: pressed
          ? `transform 0.1s ${EASE.snappy}, filter 0.1s ${EASE.snappy}` // press: quick, no bounce
          : `transform 0.35s ${EASE.spring}, filter 0.2s ${EASE.standard}`, // release: springy pop back
        cursor:disabled?"not-allowed":"pointer", opacity:disabled?0.6:1,
        userSelect:"none", WebkitUserSelect:"none", touchAction:"manipulation",
      }}
    >{children}</div>
  );
}

// ── PARTICLES ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function Particles({trigger,accentColor}) {
  const canvasRef=useRef(null);const parts=useRef([]);const raf=useRef(null);
  const spawn=useCallback((cx,cy,count=32)=>{ const glyphs=["🐾","💕","⭐","✨","💫","🌟"]; for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const a=(Math.PI*2*i/count)+Math.random()*0.5,sp=3.5+Math.random()*7;parts.current.push({x:cx,y:cy,vx:Math.cos(a)*sp,vy:Math.sin(a)*sp-2.5,life:1,decay:0.018+Math.random()*0.012,sz:10+Math.random()*14,glyph:glyphs[Math.floor(Math.random()*glyphs.length)],rot:Math.random()*Math.PI*2,rs:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.18});} },[]);
  useEffect(()=>{if(trigger)spawn(trigger.x,trigger.y,trigger.count||32);},[trigger,spawn]);
  useEffect(()=>{const cv=canvasRef.current;if(!cv)return;const ctx=cv.getContext("2d");const resize=()=>{cv.width=window.innerWidth;cv.height=window.innerHeight;};resize();window.addEventListener("resize",resize);const draw=()=>{ctx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);parts.current=parts.current.filter(p=>p.life>0);parts.current.forEach(p=>{ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=Math.max(0,p.life);ctx.font=`${p.sz}px serif`;ctx.textAlign="center";ctx.textBaseline="middle";ctx.translate(p.x,p.y);ctx.rotate(p.rot);ctx.fillText(p.glyph,0,0);ctx.restore();p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.vy+=0.18;p.vx*=0.97;p.life-=p.decay;p.rot+=p.rs;});raf.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw);};draw();return()=>{cancelAnimationFrame(raf.current);window.removeEventListener("resize",resize);};},[]);
  return <canvas ref={canvasRef} style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,pointerEvents:"none",zIndex:999}}/>;
}

// ── STREAK RING ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Small custom paw glyph — cleaner and more legible than the 🐾 emoji at tiny sizes,
// and lets us control fill color exactly (solid for lit, outline for unlit).
function PawGlyph({size=14, lit, color, glow}) {
  const gid = `paw-${color?.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g,"")}-${size}`;
  return (
    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 24 24" style={{
      filter: lit ? `drop-shadow(0 0 ${size*0.32}px ${glow}aa)` : "none",
      transition:"filter 0.4s ease",
    }}>
      {lit && (
        <defs>
          <radialGradient id={gid} cx="40%" cy="30%" r="75%">
            <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#ffffff" stopOpacity="0.55"/>
            <stop offset="35%" stopColor={color} stopOpacity="1"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stopColor={color} stopOpacity="0.85"/>
          </radialGradient>
        </defs>
      )}
      <g fill={lit ? `url(#${gid})` : "none"} stroke={lit ? "none" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.24)"} strokeWidth={lit?0:1.5} strokeLinejoin="round">
        {/* main pad — slightly heart-tapered, not a plain oval */}
        <path d="M12 20.4c-3.2 0-5.9-1.9-5.9-4.9 0-3.5 2.9-5.6 5.9-5.6s5.9 2.1 5.9 5.6c0 3-2.7 4.9-5.9 4.9z"/>
        {/* four toe beans — asymmetric sizing like a real paw, curved inward */}
        <ellipse cx="5.6" cy="10.2" rx="2.15" ry="2.6" transform="rotate(-18 5.6 10.2)"/>
        <ellipse cx="10.1" cy="6.3" rx="1.95" ry="2.4" transform="rotate(-6 10.1 6.3)"/>
        <ellipse cx="14.4" cy="6.1" rx="1.95" ry="2.4" transform="rotate(6 14.4 6.1)"/>
        <ellipse cx="18.5" cy="9.9" rx="2.15" ry="2.6" transform="rotate(18 18.5 9.9)"/>
      </g>
      {/* soft highlight dot on the main pad for a glossy, cute finish — lit state only */}
      {lit && <ellipse cx="10" cy="16.5" rx="1.3" ry="0.9" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.35"/>}
    </svg>
  );
}

// ── PAW STREAK STRIP — replaces the ring/donut entirely ──
// Shows a rolling row of paw prints: filled + glowing for each day of the
// current streak (most recent 7), hollow/gray for empty slots. The number
// sits beside it, bold and unmistakable, rather than crammed inside a shape.
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ── STREAK FREEZE SYSTEM ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const FREEZE_ICY = { light:"#F1FCFF", mid:"#8FDCF3", deep:"#2B8DC0", text:"#DCF7FF", accent:"rgba(95,203,239,1)" };

// One pad of the paw — either a toe (ellipse) or the main pad (scalloped shape).
// `filled` controls icy-gradient vs empty-dashed rendering. `breaking` triggers
// the one-shot shatter animation when a freeze is consumed on this exact pad.
function FreezePad({ type, filled, breaking, gradId, cx, cy, rx, ry, rotate, scale=1, toePath, mainPath, onBreakDone }) {
  const [shards, setShards] = useState([]);
  const shardId = useRef(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!breaking) return;
    const count = 6 + Math.floor(Math.random()*2); // 6–7 shards
    const newShards = Array.from({length:count}).map(() => {
      const angle = Math.random()*Math.PI*2;
      const dist = 18 + Math.random()*22;
      return {
        id: shardId.current++,
        dx: Math.cos(angle)*dist, dy: Math.sin(angle)*dist,
        rot: (Math.random()-0.5)*360,
        delay: Math.random()*0.05,
        size: 3.5 + Math.random()*3,
      };
    });
    setShards(newShards);
    const t = setTimeout(() => { setShards([]); onBreakDone?.(); }, 650);
    return () => clearTimeout(t);
  }, [breaking]);

  const emptyStroke = "#2A3F52";
  const emptyFill = "#101E29";
  const burstR = type==="toe" ? 4 : (rx||7);

  return (
    <g style={{
      transformOrigin: `${cx}px ${cy}px`,
      animation: breaking ? "freezeCrack 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)" : "none",
    }}>
      {type === "toe" ? (
        <path
          d={toePath}
          transform={`translate(${cx} ${cy}) rotate(${rotate}) scale(${scale})`}
          fill={filled ? `url(#${gradId})` : emptyFill}
          stroke={filled ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.55)" : emptyStroke}
          strokeWidth={filled ? 0.55 : 1.2}
          strokeDasharray={filled ? "none" : "2.5 2.2"}
          strokeLinejoin="round"
          opacity={filled ? 1 : 0.85}
          style={{
            filter: filled ? `drop-shadow(0 0 3px ${FREEZE_ICY.accent})` : "none",
            transition:"fill 0.15s, opacity 0.3s",
          }}
        />
      ) : (
        <path
          d={mainPath}
          fill={filled ? `url(#${gradId})` : emptyFill}
          stroke={filled ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.55)" : emptyStroke}
          strokeWidth={filled ? 0.6 : 1.3}
          strokeDasharray={filled ? "none" : "4 3"}
          strokeLinejoin="round"
          opacity={filled ? 1 : 0.85}
          style={{
            filter: filled ? `drop-shadow(0 0 3px ${FREEZE_ICY.accent})` : "none",
            transition:"fill 0.15s, opacity 0.3s",
          }}
        />
      )}

      {/* expanding ring burst */}
      {breaking && (
        <circle cx={cx} cy={cy} r={burstR} fill="none" stroke={FREEZE_ICY.mid} strokeWidth="1.5"
          style={{ animation:"freezeRingBurst 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) forwards" }}/>
      )}

      {/* ice shards flying outward — driven by CSS custom properties for reliability across browsers */}
      {shards.map(s => (
        <polygon
          key={s.id}
          points={`${cx},${cy-s.size} ${cx+s.size*0.7},${cy+s.size*0.6} ${cx-s.size*0.7},${cy+s.size*0.6}`}
          fill={FREEZE_ICY.light}
          opacity="0.9"
          style={{
            transformOrigin:`${cx}px ${cy}px`,
            "--shard-dx": `${s.dx}px`,
            "--shard-dy": `${s.dy}px`,
            "--shard-rot": `${s.rot}deg`,
            animation:`freezeShardFly 0.6s ease-out ${s.delay}s forwards`,
          }}
        />
      ))}
    </g>
  );
}

// Full 5-pad paw. `remaining` = freezes left (0-5). `breakingIndex` = which pad
// (0-4, in consumption order) is currently mid-shatter, or null.
// Consumption order: 0=outer-left toe, 1=outer-right toe, 2=inner-left toe, 3=inner-right toe, 4=main pad.
function FreezePaw({ size=21, remaining, breakingIndex=null, onBreakDone, idPrefix="fz" }) {
  const gid = `${idPrefix}-grad-${size}`;
  // pad fill order matches consumption order — pad[i] is filled while (5 - remaining) <= i is false,
  // i.e. a pad is filled if its index >= number of freezes already used.
  const used = MAX_FREEZES - remaining;
  const filledAt = (i) => i >= used;

  // Real cat-paw toe shape: tapered/pointed at the tip, rounded and wider at the base
  // where it meets the paw — not a symmetric ellipse. Drawn in local 0,0-centered
  // coordinates, then positioned + rotated via a wrapping transform per toe.
  const toePath = "M0 -6.4c1.7 0 3.1 1.55 3.1 4.35 0 2.35-1.35 3.85-3.1 3.85s-3.1-1.5-3.1-3.85c0-2.8 1.4-4.35 3.1-4.35z";

  // Toe placements: center position + individual rotation, radiating outward from
  // the top of the main pad like real claws/toes fanning out.
  const toes = [
    { cx:4.4,  cy:10.4, scale:0.92, rotate:-32 }, // 0: outer-left
    { cx:19.6, cy:10.4, scale:0.92, rotate:32  }, // 1: outer-right
    { cx:8.9,  cy:6.1,  scale:1.0,  rotate:-11 }, // 2: inner-left
    { cx:15.1, cy:6.1,  scale:1.0,  rotate:11  }, // 3: inner-right
  ];

  // Main pad: a proper trilobed heel shape — wider scalloped top (where the toes
  // attach) tapering to a rounded, slightly narrower bottom, like a real cat's
  // palm pad, not a plain blob.
  const mainPad = "M12 10.2c2.4 0 4.3 1.1 5.6 2.7 1.35 1.7 1.9 3.85 1.9 5.6 0 2.05-.85 3.75-2.35 4.85-1.4 1.05-3.3 1.55-5.15 1.55s-3.75-.5-5.15-1.55c-1.5-1.1-2.35-2.8-2.35-4.85 0-1.75.55-3.9 1.9-5.6 1.3-1.6 3.2-2.7 5.6-2.7z";

  return (
    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 24 24" style={{ overflow:"visible" }}>
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id={gid} x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor={FREEZE_ICY.light}/>
          <stop offset="50%" stopColor={FREEZE_ICY.mid}/>
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor={FREEZE_ICY.deep}/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>

      {toes.map((t,i) => (
        <FreezePad key={i} type="toe" gradId={gid} toePath={toePath}
          cx={t.cx} cy={t.cy} scale={t.scale} rotate={t.rotate}
          filled={filledAt(i)} breaking={breakingIndex===i}
          onBreakDone={onBreakDone}/>
      ))}
      <FreezePad type="main" gradId={gid} mainPath={mainPad}
        cx={12} cy={16.5} rx={7.5} ry={6}
        filled={filledAt(4)} breaking={breakingIndex===4}
        onBreakDone={onBreakDone}/>
    </svg>
  );
}

// Small frost/asterisk mark — signals "frozen" at a glance, corner-anchored.
function FrostMark({ size=8, x, y }) {
  return (
    <g transform={`translate(${x},${y})`}>
      <line x1={-size/2} y1="0" x2={size/2} y2="0" stroke="#fff" strokeWidth="1.1" strokeLinecap="round"/>
      <line x1={-size/2*0.7} y1={-size/2*0.7} x2={size/2*0.7} y2={size/2*0.7} stroke="#fff" strokeWidth="1.1" strokeLinecap="round"/>
      <line x1={-size/2*0.7} y1={size/2*0.7} x2={size/2*0.7} y2={-size/2*0.7} stroke="#fff" strokeWidth="1.1" strokeLinecap="round"/>
    </g>
  );
}

// The compact badge icon — paw + corner frost mark, ~21x21.
function FreezeBadgeIcon({ size=21 }) {
  const gid = "badge-freeze-grad";
  const toePath = "M0 -6.4c1.7 0 3.1 1.55 3.1 4.35 0 2.35-1.35 3.85-3.1 3.85s-3.1-1.5-3.1-3.85c0-2.8 1.4-4.35 3.1-4.35z";
  const mainPad = "M12 10.2c2.4 0 4.3 1.1 5.6 2.7 1.35 1.7 1.9 3.85 1.9 5.6 0 2.05-.85 3.75-2.35 4.85-1.4 1.05-3.3 1.55-5.15 1.55s-3.75-.5-5.15-1.55c-1.5-1.1-2.35-2.8-2.35-4.85 0-1.75.55-3.9 1.9-5.6 1.3-1.6 3.2-2.7 5.6-2.7z";
  return (
    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 24 24" style={{
      filter:"drop-shadow(0 0 2.5px rgba(95,203,239,0.7))",
      overflow:"visible", flexShrink:0,
    }}>
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id={gid} x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor={FREEZE_ICY.light}/>
          <stop offset="50%" stopColor={FREEZE_ICY.mid}/>
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor={FREEZE_ICY.deep}/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <path d={toePath} transform="translate(4.4 10.4) rotate(-32) scale(0.92)" fill={`url(#${gid})`}/>
      <path d={toePath} transform="translate(19.6 10.4) rotate(32) scale(0.92)" fill={`url(#${gid})`}/>
      <path d={toePath} transform="translate(8.9 6.1) rotate(-11) scale(1)" fill={`url(#${gid})`}/>
      <path d={toePath} transform="translate(15.1 6.1) rotate(11) scale(1)" fill={`url(#${gid})`}/>
      <path d={mainPad} fill={`url(#${gid})`}/>
      <FrostMark size={7} x={19} y={4}/>
    </svg>
  );
}

// ── FREEZE BADGE — the pill shown in the UI chrome ──
function FreezeBadge({ remaining, onClick }) {
  return (
    <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onClick} style={{
      display:"inline-flex", alignItems:"center", gap:6,
      borderRadius:999,
      background:"rgba(95,203,239,0.08)",
      border:"1px solid rgba(95,203,239,0.22)",
      padding:"7px 12px 7px 9px",
    }}>
      <FreezeBadgeIcon size={21}/>
      <span style={{ fontSize:15, fontWeight:900, color:FREEZE_ICY.text, lineHeight:1 }}>{remaining}</span>
    </PressBtn>
  );
}

// ── FREEZE POPOVER — read-only breakdown, no manual trigger ──
function FreezePopover({ remaining, breakingIndex, onBreakDone, onClose, anchorRef }) {
  const popRef = useRef(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleOutside = (e) => {
      if (popRef.current && !popRef.current.contains(e.target) &&
          anchorRef?.current && !anchorRef.current.contains(e.target)) {
        onClose();
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleOutside);
    document.addEventListener("touchstart", handleOutside);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleOutside);
      document.removeEventListener("touchstart", handleOutside);
    };
  }, [onClose, anchorRef]);

  return (
    <div style={{ position:"fixed", inset:0, zIndex:700, pointerEvents:"none" }}>
      <div ref={popRef} style={{
        position:"absolute", top:"calc(64px + env(safe-area-inset-top))", right:20,
        width:220, pointerEvents:"auto",
        background:"linear-gradient(180deg,#0F1E2B,#132434)",
        border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
        borderRadius:18, padding:20,
        boxShadow:"0 20px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)",
        animation:`popoverIn 0.3s ${EASE.springSoft}`,
      }}>
        {/* pointer triangle */}
        <div style={{
          position:"absolute", top:-7, right:28,
          width:14, height:14, background:"#0F1E2B",
          borderLeft:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
          borderTop:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
          transform:"rotate(45deg)",
        }}/>

        <div style={{ fontSize:14, fontWeight:800, color:"#fff", marginBottom:3 }}>Streak freezes</div>
        <div style={{ fontSize:11, color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.4)", lineHeight:1.5, marginBottom:16 }}>
          Protects your streak on a missed day
        </div>

        <div style={{ display:"flex", justifyContent:"center", marginBottom:14 }}>
          <FreezePaw size={130} remaining={remaining} breakingIndex={breakingIndex} onBreakDone={onBreakDone} idPrefix="pop"/>
        </div>

        <div style={{ textAlign:"center", fontSize:13, color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.55)", fontWeight:600 }}>
          <span style={{ color:FREEZE_ICY.text, fontWeight:900, fontSize:15 }}>{remaining}</span> of {MAX_FREEZES} remaining
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
function StreakStrip({streak, bumpedToday=true, size="md"}) {
  const lv=getLevel(streak);
  const displayLv = bumpedToday ? lv : STREAK_LEVELS[0];
  const dims = size==="lg" ? {paw:20, num:34, gap:5, label:11} : {paw:14, num:22, gap:4, label:9.5};
  const slots = 7;
  // how many of the last 7 slots are "lit" — caps at 7, doesn't try to represent
  // streaks longer than a week literally (that's what the number is for)
  const lit = bumpedToday ? Math.min(streak, slots) : Math.min(Math.max(streak-1,0), slots);

  return (
    <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:dims.gap*2.4}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"flex-start",lineHeight:1}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"baseline",gap:5}}>
          <span style={{
            fontSize:dims.num,fontWeight:900,letterSpacing:-0.5,
            color:bumpedToday?displayLv.color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.4)",
            transition:"color 0.4s ease",
          }}>{streak}</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:dims.label,fontWeight:700,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:0.5}}>
            {streak===1?"day":"days"}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:dims.gap,marginTop:6}}>
          {Array.from({length:slots}).map((_,i)=>(
            <PawGlyph key={i} size={dims.paw} lit={i<lit} color={displayLv.color} glow={displayLv.glow}/>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── ANIMATED ONBOARDING ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Page 0 is the mandatory name-entry screen — handled specially, not a swipe-through slide.
const OB_PAGES = [
  { emoji:"🐱", bg:["#0d0118","#1a0533"], accent:"#c084fc", title:"Welcome to FistPaw", body:"Your daily cat companion. One fist bump a day keeps the chaos away.", sub:"Swipe to explore →" },
  { emoji:"🐾", bg:["#00120a","#0a2218"], accent:"#34d399", title:"Meet Your Daily Cats", body:"Seven cats. Seven days. Each one ready to bump you into a great day.", sub:"Your cat awaits →" },
  { emoji:"🔥", bg:["#120d00","#1a1200"], accent:"#fbbf24", title:"Build Your Streak", body:"Bump every day. Watch your streak climb through 9 levels — from Sparkling all the way to Eternal.", sub:"Keep going →" },
  { emoji:"🏆", bg:["#00100f","#0a1a1a"], accent:"#22d3ee", title:"Unlock Achievements", body:"Hit milestones. Unlock badges. Earn your place in the Legendary Paw hall of fame.", sub:"Almost there →" },
  { emoji:"👊", bg:["#12001a","#1a0a1a"], accent:"#f472b6", title:"Ready to Bump?", body:"Tap to fist bump · Double-tap to pet · Swipe pages to navigate · Swipe your cat for reactions", sub:"Let's go! 🐾" },
];
const NAME_BG = ["#12001a","#1e0a2e"];
const NAME_ACCENT = "#e879f9";

// ── AVATAR SYSTEM ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// A profile picture is stored as { type: "emoji", value: "😺" } or
// { type: "photo", value: "data:image/...;base64,..." } — one JSON blob in
// localStorage alongside the rest of the user's identity data.
const AVATAR_EMOJIS = ["🐱","😺","😸","😻","😼","😽","🙀","😿","😾","🐈","🐈‍⬛","🦁","🐯","🐆"];
const DEFAULT_AVATAR = { type:"emoji", value:"🐱" };
const AVATAR_ACCENT = "#e879f9";
const AVATAR_BG = ["#12001a","#1e0a2e"];

function NameEntry({onContinue, theme, initialName="", onCancel}) {
  const isEditing = !!onCancel;
  const [name,setName]=useState(initialName);
  const [shake,setShake]=useState(false);
  const inputRef=useRef(null);
  const audio=useRef(buildAudio());

  useEffect(()=>{ setTimeout(()=>inputRef.current?.focus(),isEditing?150:400); },[isEditing]);

  const submit=()=>{
    const trimmed=name.trim();
    if(!trimmed){
      setShake(true); haptic.heavy(); audio.current.click();
      setTimeout(()=>setShake(false),400);
      return;
    }
    haptic.success();
    onContinue(trimmed);
  };

  const catBounce = ["🐱","😸","😻","🐾"];

  return (
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:`linear-gradient(160deg,${theme.bg[0]} 0%,${theme.bg[1]} 55%,${theme.bg[2]} 100%)`,
      display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
      zIndex:1000,fontFamily:"system-ui,sans-serif",overflow:"hidden",padding:24}}>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes nameFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-14px) rotate(6deg)}}
        @keyframes namePulseRing{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:0.4}50%{transform:scale(1.08);opacity:0.75}}
        @keyframes nameShimmer{0%{background-position:200% center}100%{background-position:-200% center}}
        @keyframes shakeX{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}20%{transform:translateX(-10px)}40%{transform:translateX(10px)}60%{transform:translateX(-6px)}80%{transform:translateX(6px)}}
        @keyframes catWiggle{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0deg) scale(1)}25%{transform:rotate(-6deg) scale(1.05)}75%{transform:rotate(6deg) scale(1.05)}}
        @keyframes popIn{0%{transform:scale(0.4);opacity:0}70%{transform:scale(1.1)}100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
        /* Force mobile browsers (esp. Android Chrome/WebView) to respect the dark
           surface instead of painting their own white autofill/focus background. */
        html,body{color-scheme:dark;}
        *{-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;user-select:none;}
        input.fp-name-input {
          background-color: transparent !important;
          color-scheme: dark;
          -webkit-user-select:text !important; -moz-user-select:text !important; user-select:text !important;
        }
        input.fp-name-input:-webkit-autofill,
        input.fp-name-input:-webkit-autofill:hover,
        input.fp-name-input:-webkit-autofill:focus {
          -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0 1000px rgba(20,10,28,0.85) inset !important;
          -webkit-text-fill-color: #fff !important;
          transition: background-color 9999s ease-in-out 0s;
        }
      `}</style>

      {/* close button — only shown when editing an existing name, never during mandatory onboarding */}
      {isEditing && (
        <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onCancel} style={{
          position:"absolute",top:"calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-top))",right:20,
          width:36,height:36,borderRadius:12,zIndex:2,
          display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
          background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
        }}>
          <span style={{fontSize:18,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)",lineHeight:1}}>×</span>
        </PressBtn>
      )}

      {/* ambient floating cat emojis */}
      {catBounce.map((c,i)=>(
        <div key={i} style={{position:"absolute",fontSize:22+i*3,
          left:`${8+i*24}%`,top:`${12+i*18}%`,opacity:0.35,
          animation:`nameFloat ${3+i*0.6}s ease-in-out infinite`,animationDelay:`${i*0.3}s`,
          pointerEvents:"none"}}>{c}</div>
      ))}

      {/* pulsing rings + cat emoji header */}
      <div style={{position:"relative",marginBottom:28}}>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:-22,borderRadius:"50%",border:`2px solid ${NAME_ACCENT}44`,animation:"namePulseRing 2.2s ease-in-out infinite"}}/>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:-10,borderRadius:"50%",border:`1.5px solid ${NAME_ACCENT}66`,animation:"namePulseRing 2.2s ease-in-out infinite",animationDelay:"0.4s"}}/>
        <div style={{fontSize:76,lineHeight:1,animation:"popIn 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1), catWiggle 2.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.6s"}}>🐱</div>
      </div>

      <h1 style={{fontSize:25,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",marginBottom:8,textAlign:"center",
        background:`linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,${NAME_ACCENT} 50%,#fff 100%)`,
        backgroundSize:"200% auto",WebkitBackgroundClip:"text",WebkitTextFillColor:"transparent",
        animation:"nameShimmer 3s linear infinite"}}>
        {isEditing ? "Update your name 🐾" : "What should your cat call you? 🐾"}
      </h1>
      <p style={{fontSize:14,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.55)",textAlign:"center",lineHeight:1.6,marginBottom:32,maxWidth:300}}>
        {isEditing ? "Your cat is happy to learn a new name any time 💕" : "Your cat wants to know your name before your very first fist bump 💕"}
      </p>

      <div style={{
        width:"100%",maxWidth:320,
        animation:shake?"shakeX 0.4s ease":"none",
      }}>
        <div style={{
          display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,
          background:`rgba(20,10,28,0.85)`, // solid-ish dark fallback so no backdrop-filter white-flash is possible
          backdropFilter:"blur(14px)",WebkitBackdropFilter:"blur(14px)",
          borderRadius:20,padding:"16px 18px",
          border:`1.5px solid ${shake?"#f87171":NAME_ACCENT+"55"}`,
          transition:"border-color 0.2s",marginBottom:16,
        }}>
          <span style={{fontSize:20}}>😺</span>
          <input
            ref={inputRef}
            className="fp-name-input"
            value={name}
            onChange={e=>setName(e.target.value.slice(0,20))}
            onKeyDown={e=>{ if(e.key==="Enter") submit(); }}
            placeholder="Your name..."
            style={{
              flex:1,border:"none",outline:"none",
              fontSize:17,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",
              fontFamily:"system-ui,sans-serif",
              background:"transparent",backgroundColor:"transparent",
              WebkitAppearance:"none",appearance:"none",
              WebkitTextFillColor:"#fff", // stops iOS/Android from re-painting text/bg on autofill
              colorScheme:"dark", // tells the browser this field lives on a dark surface
              caretColor:NAME_ACCENT,
            }}
            maxLength={20}
            autoComplete="off"
            autoCapitalize="words"
            autoCorrect="off"
            spellCheck="false"
          />
        </div>

        <PressBtn
          hapticType="success"
          onClick={submit}
          style={{
            width:"100%",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${NAME_ACCENT},#c084fc)`,
            borderRadius:20,padding:"16px",textAlign:"center",
            fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",
            boxShadow:`0 8px 28px ${NAME_ACCENT}55`,letterSpacing:0.4,
          }}
        >
          {isEditing ? "Save name →" : "Continue with this name →"}
        </PressBtn>
      </div>

      {!name.trim() && (
        <div style={{marginTop:16,fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)",textAlign:"center"}}>
          🐾 your cat is waiting for a name to continue
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ── AVATAR PICKER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Shown right after name entry during onboarding (isEditing=false), and reused
// from Settings for changing your avatar later (isEditing=true, adds a close button).
function AvatarPicker({ onContinue, onCancel, initialAvatar, userName }) {
  const isEditing = !!onCancel;
  const [avatar, setAvatar] = useState(initialAvatar || DEFAULT_AVATAR);
  const audio = useRef(buildAudio());

  const selectEmoji = (emoji) => {
    haptic.light(); audio.current.click();
    setAvatar({ type:"emoji", value:emoji });
  };

  const handleFileChange = (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    if (!file.type.startsWith("image/")) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => {
      haptic.success();
      setAvatar({ type:"photo", value: reader.result });
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  };

  const confirm = () => {
    haptic.success();
    onContinue(avatar);
  };

  const AvatarPreview = ({ size=96 }) => (
    avatar.type==="photo"
      ? <img src={avatar.value} alt="Your avatar" style={{
          width:size, height:size, borderRadius:size*0.32, objectFit:"cover",
          boxShadow:`0 8px 24px -6px ${AVATAR_ACCENT}66`,
        }}/>
      : <div style={{
          width:size, height:size, borderRadius:size*0.32, fontSize:size*0.55,
          display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"center",
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${AVATAR_ACCENT}33,${AVATAR_ACCENT}11)`,
          boxShadow:`0 8px 24px -6px ${AVATAR_ACCENT}44`,
        }}>{avatar.value}</div>
  );

  return (
    <div style={{
      position:"fixed", inset:0,
      background:`linear-gradient(160deg,${AVATAR_BG[0]} 0%,${AVATAR_BG[1]} 60%,#000 100%)`,
      display:"flex", flexDirection:"column", alignItems:"center",
      zIndex:1000, fontFamily:"system-ui,sans-serif", overflow:"hidden",
    }}>
      <style>{`
        @keyframes avatarPop{0%{transform:scale(0.4);opacity:0}70%{transform:scale(1.1)}100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
        @keyframes avatarGridIn{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px) scale(0.9)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}
      `}</style>

      {isEditing && (
        <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onCancel} style={{
          position:"absolute", top:"calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-top))", right:20, zIndex:2,
          width:36, height:36, borderRadius:12,
          display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"center",
          background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
        }}>
          <span style={{ fontSize:18, color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)", lineHeight:1 }}>×</span>
        </PressBtn>
      )}

      <div style={{
        flex:1, width:"100%", overflowY:"auto",
        padding:"calc(56px + env(safe-area-inset-top)) 24px calc(28px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))",
        display:"flex", flexDirection:"column", alignItems:"center", maxWidth:420, margin:"0 auto",
      }}>
        <div style={{ animation:"avatarPop 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)", marginBottom:18 }}>
          <AvatarPreview size={100}/>
        </div>

        <h1 style={{ fontSize:23, fontWeight:900, color:"#fff", textAlign:"center", marginBottom:6 }}>
          {isEditing ? "Update your avatar" : `Pick your look, ${userName||"friend"}`}
        </h1>
        <p style={{ fontSize:13.5, color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)", textAlign:"center", lineHeight:1.6, marginBottom:26, maxWidth:300 }}>
          Choose a cat, or upload your own photo — your cat likes to know who it's bumping fists with 🐾
        </p>

        {/* upload button — uses the native HTML label+input pairing. Clicking/tapping
            a <label> that wraps its <input type="file"> is guaranteed by the HTML
            spec to open the OS file/gallery picker, with zero JavaScript involved
            in triggering it. This is the only approach that's bulletproof across
            every mobile browser and WebView — no proxied .click() calls, no
            opacity-0 overlay quirks, nothing that can silently fail. */}
        <label style={{
          position:"relative",
          width:"100%", background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",
          borderRadius:16, padding:"13px", marginBottom:22,
          display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"center", gap:8,
          cursor:"pointer",
        }}>
          <span style={{ fontSize:16 }}>🖼️</span>
          <span style={{ fontSize:13.5, fontWeight:700, color:"#fff" }}>Upload from gallery</span>
          <input
            type="file"
            accept="image/*"
            onChange={handleFileChange}
            style={{ position:"absolute", width:1, height:1, overflow:"hidden", clip:"rect(0,0,0,0)", whiteSpace:"nowrap" }}
          />
        </label>

        <div style={{ display:"flex", alignItems:"center", gap:10, width:"100%", marginBottom:20 }}>
          <div style={{ flex:1, height:1, background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }}/>
          <span style={{ fontSize:10.5, color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", fontWeight:700, letterSpacing:1, textTransform:"uppercase" }}>or choose a cat</span>
          <div style={{ flex:1, height:1, background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }}/>
        </div>

        {/* emoji grid */}
        <div style={{
          display:"grid", gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4, 1fr)", gap:12,
          width:"100%", marginBottom:28,
        }}>
          {AVATAR_EMOJIS.map((emoji, i) => {
            const selected = avatar.type==="emoji" && avatar.value===emoji;
            return (
              <PressBtn key={emoji} hapticType="light" onClick={()=>selectEmoji(emoji)} style={{
                aspectRatio:"1", borderRadius:16, fontSize:28,
                display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"center",
                background: selected ? `linear-gradient(135deg,${AVATAR_ACCENT}44,${AVATAR_ACCENT}22)` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",
                border: selected ? `1.5px solid ${AVATAR_ACCENT}` : "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
                boxShadow: selected ? `0 0 16px ${AVATAR_ACCENT}55` : "none",
                animation:`avatarGridIn 0.35s ${EASE.decelerate} both`,
                animationDelay:`${i*0.03}s`,
              }}>{emoji}</PressBtn>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        <PressBtn hapticType="success" onClick={confirm} style={{
          width:"100%", background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${AVATAR_ACCENT},#c084fc)`,
          borderRadius:22, padding:"15px", textAlign:"center",
          fontSize:16, fontWeight:800, color:"#fff",
          boxShadow:`0 8px 28px ${AVATAR_ACCENT}55`, letterSpacing:0.4,
        }}>
          {isEditing ? "Save avatar →" : "Continue →"}
        </PressBtn>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function Onboarding({onDone}) {
  const [nameDone,setNameDone]=useState(false);
  const [userName,setUserNameLocal]=useState("");
  const [avatarDone,setAvatarDone]=useState(false);
  const [userAvatar,setUserAvatarLocal]=useState(DEFAULT_AVATAR);
  const [pg,setPg]=useState(0);
  const [dir,setDir]=useState(1); // 1=forward -1=back
  const [animKey,setAnimKey]=useState(0);
  const [dragStart,setDragStart]=useState(null);
  const [dragX,setDragX]=useState(0);
  const [isDragging,setIsDragging]=useState(false);
  const audio=useRef(buildAudio());
  const p=OB_PAGES[pg];

  // ── Mandatory name gate — shown first, cannot be skipped ──
  if(!nameDone){
    return (
      <NameEntry
        theme={{bg:NAME_BG}}
        onContinue={(name)=>{ setUserNameLocal(name); setNameDone(true); }}
      />
    );
  }

  // ── Avatar picker — shown second, right after choosing a name ──
  if(!avatarDone){
    return (
      <AvatarPicker
        userName={userName}
        initialAvatar={DEFAULT_AVATAR}
        onContinue={(avatar)=>{ setUserAvatarLocal(avatar); setAvatarDone(true); }}
      />
    );
  }

  const goTo=(next,direction)=>{
    if(next<0||next>=OB_PAGES.length) return;
    setDir(direction);
    setAnimKey(k=>k+1);
    setPg(next);
    haptic.swipe();
    audio.current.swipe();
  };

  const next=()=>{ if(pg<OB_PAGES.length-1) goTo(pg+1,1); else { haptic.success(); onDone(userName, userAvatar); } };
  const prev=()=>{ if(pg>0){ haptic.light(); goTo(pg-1,-1); } };

  // swipe gestures
  const onTS=(e)=>{ setDragStart({x:e.touches[0].clientX,y:e.touches[0].clientY}); setDragX(0); setIsDragging(false); };
  const onTM=(e)=>{
    if(!dragStart) return;
    const dx=e.touches[0].clientX-dragStart.x;
    const dy=Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientY-dragStart.y);
    if(Math.abs(dx)>10 && dy<40){ setIsDragging(true); setDragX(dx); e.preventDefault(); }
  };
  const onTE=()=>{
    if(isDragging){
      if(dragX<-50) next();
      else if(dragX>50) prev();
    }
    setDragStart(null); setDragX(0); setIsDragging(false);
  };

  // floating particles for onboarding
  const floaters = ["✨","🌟","💫","🐾","⭐","💕"];

  // Personalize first slide's body with the user's name
  const personalizedBody = pg===0
    ? `Hey ${userName}! Your daily cat companion. One fist bump a day keeps the chaos away.`
    : p.body;

  return (
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:`linear-gradient(160deg,${p.bg[0]} 0%,${p.bg[1]} 55%,${p.bg[2]||"#000"} 100%)`,
      display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
      zIndex:1000,fontFamily:"system-ui,sans-serif",overflow:"hidden",
      transition:"background 0.5s ease"}}
      onTouchStart={onTS} onTouchMove={onTM} onTouchEnd={onTE}>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes obFadeIn{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateX(${dir>0?"60px":"-60px"}) scale(0.92)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0) scale(1)}}
        @keyframes obFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-18px) rotate(8deg)}}
        @keyframes obBounce{0%{transform:scale(0.5) rotate(-10deg);opacity:0}60%{transform:scale(1.15) rotate(3deg)}80%{transform:scale(0.95) rotate(-1deg)}100%{transform:scale(1) rotate(0deg);opacity:1}}
        @keyframes floaterDrift{0%{transform:translateY(0) translateX(0) rotate(0deg);opacity:0.6}50%{transform:translateY(-40px) translateX(15px) rotate(20deg);opacity:0.3}100%{transform:translateY(-80px) translateX(-10px) rotate(-10deg);opacity:0}}
        @keyframes pulseRing{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:0.4}50%{transform:scale(1.08);opacity:0.8}}
        @keyframes shimmerText{0%{background-position:200% center}100%{background-position:-200% center}}
      `}</style>

      {/* ambient floating particles */}
      {floaters.map((f,i)=>(
        <div key={i} style={{position:"absolute",fontSize:18+i*4,
          left:`${10+i*15}%`,bottom:`${5+i*8}%`,
          animation:`floaterDrift ${3+i*0.7}s ease-in-out infinite`,
          animationDelay:`${i*0.4}s`,pointerEvents:"none",opacity:0.5}}>
          {f}
        </div>
      ))}

      {/* pulsing ring behind emoji */}
      <div style={{position:"relative",marginBottom:32}}>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:-24,borderRadius:"50%",
          border:`2px solid ${p.accent}44`,
          animation:"pulseRing 2s ease-in-out infinite"}}/>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:-12,borderRadius:"50%",
          border:`1.5px solid ${p.accent}66`,
          animation:"pulseRing 2s ease-in-out infinite",animationDelay:"0.5s"}}/>
        <div key={`emoji-${animKey}`} style={{
          fontSize:88,lineHeight:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
          animation:"obBounce 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)",
        }}>
          {pg===2 ? <Flame size={88} level={STREAK_LEVELS[3]}/> : p.emoji}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* text — animate per page */}
      <div key={`text-${animKey}`} style={{textAlign:"center",maxWidth:320,padding:"0 24px",
        animation:"obFadeIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94)"}}>
        <h1 style={{fontSize:26,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",marginBottom:10,lineHeight:1.2,
          background:`linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,${p.accent} 50%,#fff 100%)`,
          backgroundSize:"200% auto",WebkitBackgroundClip:"text",WebkitTextFillColor:"transparent",
          animation:"shimmerText 3s linear infinite"}}>{pg===0?`Welcome, ${userName}! 🐾`:p.title}</h1>
        <p style={{fontSize:14.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.62)",lineHeight:1.7,marginBottom:32}}>{personalizedBody}</p>
      </div>

      {/* dots */}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:36,alignItems:"center"}}>
        {OB_PAGES.map((_,i)=>(
          <div key={i} onClick={()=>{ haptic.light(); goTo(i,i>pg?1:-1); }} style={{
            width:i===pg?28:8,height:8,borderRadius:4,transition:"all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)",
            background:i===pg?p.accent:"rgba(255,255,255,0.2)",cursor:"pointer",
            boxShadow:i===pg?`0 0 10px ${p.accent}88`:"none",
          }}/>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CTA button */}
      <PressBtn
        hapticType={pg===OB_PAGES.length-1?"success":"light"}
        onClick={next}
        style={{
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${p.accent},${p.accent}99)`,
          borderRadius:22,padding:"15px 48px",fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,
          color:"#fff",boxShadow:`0 8px 28px ${p.accent}55`,letterSpacing:0.5,
          border:"none",
        }}
      >
        {pg===OB_PAGES.length-1?"Begin 🐾":p.sub}
      </PressBtn>

      {/* back hint */}
      {pg>0&&(
        <div onClick={prev} style={{marginTop:18,fontSize:12,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:600}}>
          ← back
        </div>
      )}

      {/* drag indicator */}
      <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:28,left:0,right:0,display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",gap:6,opacity:0.3}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#fff",fontWeight:600}}>swipe to navigate</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


// ── ACHIEVEMENT CARD ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const ACH_EMOJI={first:"🐾",three:"🔥",week:"⚡",fort:"🌙",month:"🏆",fifty:"😸",hundred:"💎",emerg:"🚨",year:"🌟",kilo:"👑"};
function AchCard({ach,unlocked,index=0,stats}) {
  const tier = ACH_TIERS[ach.tier] || ACH_TIERS.bronze;
  const [current, target] = ach.progress ? ach.progress(stats) : [0,1];
  return (
    <div style={{
      display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:14,
      background: unlocked
        ? `linear-gradient(135deg, ${tier.gradient[0]}22, ${tier.gradient[1]}0d)`
        : "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)",
      borderRadius:18,padding:"14px 15px",
      border: unlocked ? `1px solid ${tier.color}33` : "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",
      boxShadow: unlocked ? `0 6px 20px -8px ${tier.glow}33` : "none",
      opacity:unlocked?1:0.65,
      animation:`cardStagger 0.45s ${EASE.decelerate} both`,
      animationDelay:`${index*0.04}s`,
      position:"relative", overflow:"hidden",
    }}>
      {/* icon badge — glowing gradient ring when unlocked, flat dark when locked */}
      <div style={{
        width:46,height:46,borderRadius:14,flexShrink:0,position:"relative",
        display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:unlocked?22:0,
        background: unlocked
          ? `linear-gradient(155deg, ${tier.gradient[1]}, ${tier.gradient[0]})`
          : "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
        boxShadow: unlocked ? `0 0 14px ${tier.glow}55, inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3)` : "none",
      }}>
        {unlocked ? ACH_EMOJI[ach.id] : <IconLock/>}
      </div>

      <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:7,marginBottom:2}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:13.5,fontWeight:800,color:unlocked?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)"}}>{ach.name}</span>
          {unlocked && (
            <span style={{
              fontSize:8.5,fontWeight:800,letterSpacing:0.6,textTransform:"uppercase",
              color:tier.color, background:`${tier.color}1a`, border:`1px solid ${tier.color}44`,
              borderRadius:6,padding:"2px 6px",flexShrink:0,
            }}>{tier.label}</span>
          )}
        </div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.4)",lineHeight:1.4}}>{ach.desc}</div>

        {/* progress bar for locked achievements — shows real progress toward unlocking */}
        {!unlocked && ach.progress && (
          <div style={{marginTop:7,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:7}}>
            <div style={{flex:1,height:4,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",borderRadius:2,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{
                height:"100%",borderRadius:2,
                background:`linear-gradient(90deg,${tier.gradient[0]},${tier.gradient[1]})`,
                width:`${Math.min(100,(current/target)*100)}%`,
                transition:"width 0.5s ease",opacity:0.7,
              }}/>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)",fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>{current}/{target}</span>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {unlocked && (
        <div style={{flexShrink:0}}>
          <IconShieldCheck size={19} color={tier.color}/>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ── EMERGENCY MODAL ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const BREATHING_AFFIRMATIONS = [
  "You are exactly where you need to be.",
  "This feeling will pass.",
  "You've survived every hard day so far.",
  "One breath at a time.",
  "You don't have to have it figured out right now.",
  "It's okay to not be okay.",
  "Your cat isn't going anywhere.",
];

function EmergencyModal({onClose,onBump,theme}) {
  const [phase,setPhase]=useState("intro"); // intro | breathing | bumped
  const [breathPhase,setBreathPhase]=useState("in"); // in | hold | out
  const [breathScale,setBreathScale]=useState(0.85);
  const [breathCount,setBreathCount]=useState(0);
  const [affirmIndex,setAffirmIndex]=useState(0);
  const audio=useRef(buildAudio());

  // gentle entrance — no siren, no flashing, just a soft focus-pull
  useEffect(()=>{
    haptic.medium();
    audio.current.chirp();
  },[]);

  // real 4-4-4 guided breathing cycle: inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s, repeat
  useEffect(()=>{
    if(phase!=="breathing") return;
    let cancelled=false;
    const cycle=async()=>{
      while(!cancelled){
        setBreathPhase("in"); haptic.light();
        await animateScale(0.85,1.15,4000);
        if(cancelled) return;
        setBreathPhase("hold");
        await wait(4000);
        if(cancelled) return;
        setBreathPhase("out"); haptic.light();
        await animateScale(1.15,0.85,4000);
        if(cancelled) return;
        setBreathCount(c=>{
          const next=c+1;
          setAffirmIndex(next % BREATHING_AFFIRMATIONS.length);
          return next;
        });
      }
    };
    const animateScale=(from,to,dur)=>new Promise(res=>{
      const start=performance.now();
      const step=(now)=>{
        if(cancelled) return res();
        const t=Math.min(1,(now-start)/dur);
        const eased=t<0.5?2*t*t:1-Math.pow(-2*t+2,2)/2; // ease-in-out
        setBreathScale(from+(to-from)*eased);
        if(t<1) requestAnimationFrame(step); else res();
      };
      requestAnimationFrame(step);
    });
    const wait=(ms)=>new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,ms));
    cycle();
    return()=>{ cancelled=true; };
  },[phase]);

  const doEmergencyBump=(e)=>{
    setPhase("bumped");
    haptic.success();
    audio.current.achievement();
    setTimeout(()=>{ onBump(e); onClose(); },900);
  };

  const breathLabel = { in:"Breathe in...", hold:"Hold...", out:"Let it go..." }[breathPhase];

  return (
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:400,
      background:"rgba(8,6,14,0.88)",
      backdropFilter:"blur(20px)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",padding:24,
      transition:"background 0.4s"}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:340,width:"100%",
        background:"linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(24,16,32,0.96), rgba(14,10,20,0.98))",
        borderRadius:28,
        padding:"32px 28px",
        border:`1px solid ${phase==="bumped"?"#34d39944":`${theme.accent}33`}`,
        boxShadow:`0 30px 70px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 50px -10px ${phase==="bumped"?"#34d39933":`${theme.glow}22`}`,
        animation:"mileIn 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)",
        transition:"border-color 0.5s,box-shadow 0.5s"}}>

        {phase==="intro" && (<>
          <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginBottom:26}}>
            <div style={{
              width:76,height:76,borderRadius:"50%",margin:"0 auto 16px",
              display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:38,
              background:`radial-gradient(circle, ${theme.accent}33, ${theme.accent}0a)`,
              animation:"gentlePulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite",
            }}>🫂</div>
            <h2 style={{fontSize:21,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",margin:"0 0 8px"}}>Having a hard moment?</h2>
            <p style={{fontSize:13.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.55)",lineHeight:1.65,margin:0}}>
              That's okay. Your cat is here for you — no pressure, no streak stress. Just breathe for a bit, or bump whenever you're ready.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
            <PressBtn hapticType="medium" onClick={()=>setPhase("breathing")} style={{
              background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${theme.accent},${theme.glow})`,borderRadius:18,padding:"15px",
              fontSize:15.5,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",textAlign:"center",
              boxShadow:`0 8px 28px ${theme.glow}44`,
            }}>🫁 Breathe with me for a moment</PressBtn>
            <PressBtn hapticType="bump" onClick={doEmergencyBump} style={{
              background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12)",
              borderRadius:18,padding:"13px",fontSize:14,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.7)",textAlign:"center",
            }}>👊 Just bump — I'm okay</PressBtn>
            <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onClose} style={{
              background:"transparent",borderRadius:18,padding:"11px",
              fontSize:12.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)",textAlign:"center",
            }}>Never mind</PressBtn>
          </div>
        </>)}

        {phase==="breathing" && (<>
          <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)",letterSpacing:1.2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:6}}>
              Breath {breathCount+1}
            </div>
            <div style={{position:"relative",width:180,height:180,margin:"8px auto 20px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
              {/* ambient breathing rings */}
              <div style={{
                position:"absolute",inset:0,borderRadius:"50%",
                background:`radial-gradient(circle, ${theme.accent}22, transparent 70%)`,
                transform:`scale(${breathScale})`,
              }}/>
              <div style={{
                transform:`scale(${breathScale})`,fontSize:72,display:"block",
                filter:`drop-shadow(0 0 ${20*breathScale}px ${theme.glow}66)`,
              }}>🐱</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:17,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:10,minHeight:24}}>
              {breathLabel}
            </div>
            <p style={{fontSize:12.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.45)",lineHeight:1.7,marginBottom:22,minHeight:38,transition:"opacity 0.3s"}}>
              {BREATHING_AFFIRMATIONS[affirmIndex]}
            </p>
            <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:9}}>
              <PressBtn hapticType="success" onClick={doEmergencyBump} style={{
                background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${theme.accent},${theme.glow})`,borderRadius:18,padding:"14px",
                fontSize:14.5,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",textAlign:"center",
                boxShadow:`0 6px 24px ${theme.glow}44`,
              }}>👊 I'm ready to bump</PressBtn>
              <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onClose} style={{
                background:"transparent",borderRadius:18,padding:"10px",
                fontSize:12,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.25)",textAlign:"center",
              }}>I'm okay now, close this</PressBtn>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>)}

        {phase==="bumped" && (
          <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"16px 0"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:60,marginBottom:16,animation:"bIn 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)"}}>💚</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:800,color:"#34d399",marginBottom:8}}>You showed up today.</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)",lineHeight:1.6}}>That's enough. Your cat is proud of you — and so should you be.</div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── HOME CONTENT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function HomeContent({stats,setStats,theme,dayIndex,catImg,onEmergency,markCatTouch,onHint,onMilestone,onAchievement,userName}) {
  const lv=getLevel(stats.streak);
  const now=new Date();
  const todayKey=now.toDateString();
  const yestKey=new Date(Date.now()-86400000).toDateString();
  const bumpedToday=stats.lastBumpDay===todayKey;

  const [bumping,setBumping]=useState(false);
  const [catAnim,setCatAnim]=useState("idle");
  const [particleTrigger,setParticleTrigger]=useState(null);
  const [message,setMessage]=useState("");
  const [showMsg,setShowMsg]=useState(false);
  const [freezePopoverOpen,setFreezePopoverOpen]=useState(false);
  const [breakingFreezeIndex,setBreakingFreezeIndex]=useState(null);
  const freezeBadgeRef=useRef(null);

  const audio=useRef(null);
  const bumpN=useRef(0);
  const dblTime=useRef(0);
  const msgTimer=useRef(null);
  const longTimer=useRef(null);
  const catRef=useRef(null);
  const catTouchStart=useRef(null);
  const catMoved=useRef(false);

  useEffect(()=>{audio.current=buildAudio();},[]);

  const showHint=(txt)=>{ onHint?.(txt); };
  const fireMsg=(msg)=>{ clearTimeout(msgTimer.current); setMessage(msg); setShowMsg(true); msgTimer.current=setTimeout(()=>setShowMsg(false),3200); };

  const doFistBump=useCallback((cx,cy,isEmergency=false)=>{
    if(bumping) return;
    setBumping(true); setCatAnim("bump");
    haptic.bump();
    const au=audio.current;
    const sounds=[au.bump,au.meow,au.meow2,au.chirp];
    sounds[bumpN.current%sounds.length]();
    bumpN.current++;

    const { newStreak, newFreezes, freezeUsed, milestoneHit } = computeStreakUpdate(stats, todayKey, yestKey);
    const newWH=[...(stats.weekHistory||Array(7).fill(false))];
    newWH[dayIndex]=true;
    const prevStats={...stats};
    const next={...stats,streak:newStreak,freezes:newFreezes,bestStreak:Math.max(stats.bestStreak,newStreak),totalBumps:stats.totalBumps+1,weekBumps:!bumpedToday?stats.weekBumps+1:stats.weekBumps,weekHistory:newWH,lastBumpDay:todayKey,usedEmergency:stats.usedEmergency||isEmergency,freezesUsedTotal:(stats.freezesUsedTotal||0)+(freezeUsed?1:0)};
    setStats(next);

    setParticleTrigger({x:cx,y:cy,count:isEmergency?52:30,id:Date.now()});
    const msg=isEmergency?["You're stronger than you know.","This too shall pass.","The cat believes in you deeply.","Breathe. You've got this.","Hard days make strong humans."][Math.floor(Math.random()*5)]:ALL_MESSAGES[Math.floor(Math.random()*ALL_MESSAGES.length)];
    fireMsg(msg);

    if(freezeUsed){
      audio.current?.chirp();
      showHint(`❄️ Streak freeze used · ${newFreezes} left`);
      // The pad that was just consumed is the one at index (MAX_FREEZES - newFreezes - 1)
      // in the toe→toe→toe→toe→mainPad consumption order.
      const consumedIndex = MAX_FREEZES - newFreezes - 1;
      setFreezePopoverOpen(true);
      setTimeout(()=>setBreakingFreezeIndex(consumedIndex), 200);
    }

    const newly=ACHIEVEMENTS.filter(a=>!a.req(prevStats)&&a.req(next));
    if(newly.length) setTimeout(()=>{ onAchievement?.(newly[0]); au.achievement(); haptic.success(); },800);
    if(milestoneHit) setTimeout(()=>{ onMilestone?.(milestoneHit); au.milestone(); haptic.milestone(); },550);
    setTimeout(()=>{setCatAnim("idle");setBumping(false);},520);
  },[bumping,stats,setStats,bumpedToday,yestKey,todayKey,dayIndex,onAchievement,onMilestone]);

  // cat touch — stable callbacks
  const onCatTouchStart=useCallback(e=>{
    if(markCatTouch) markCatTouch(true);
    catTouchStart.current={x:e.touches[0].clientX,y:e.touches[0].clientY};
    catMoved.current=false;
  },[markCatTouch]);

  const onCatTouchMove=useCallback(e=>{
    if(!catTouchStart.current) return;
    const dx=Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientX-catTouchStart.current.x);
    const dy=Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientY-catTouchStart.current.y);
    if(dx>6||dy>6){ catMoved.current=true; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); }
  },[]);

  const onCatTouchEnd=useCallback(e=>{
    if(!catTouchStart.current) return;
    const dx=e.changedTouches[0].clientX-catTouchStart.current.x;
    const dy=e.changedTouches[0].clientY-catTouchStart.current.y;
    const adx=Math.abs(dx),ady=Math.abs(dy);
    catTouchStart.current=null;
    if(!catMoved.current){
      const now2=Date.now();
      if(now2-dblTime.current<350){
        dblTime.current=0;
        setCatAnim("sway"); audio.current?.purr(); haptic.light(); showHint("😸 Petted!");
        setTimeout(()=>setCatAnim("idle"),900);
      } else {
        dblTime.current=now2;
        const rect=catRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();
        if(rect) setTimeout(()=>{ if(dblTime.current!==0) doFistBump(rect.left+rect.width/2,rect.top+rect.height/2); },360);
      }
      setTimeout(()=>{ if(markCatTouch) markCatTouch(false); },50);
      return;
    }
    if(adx<30&&ady<30){ setTimeout(()=>{ if(markCatTouch) markCatTouch(false); },50); return; }
    if(ady>adx){
      if(dy<0){ setCatAnim("bounce"); audio.current?.chirp(); haptic.light(); showHint("⚡ Hyper!"); setTimeout(()=>setCatAnim("idle"),650); }
      else { setCatAnim("sway"); audio.current?.purr(); haptic.light(); showHint("😴 Stretch~"); setTimeout(()=>setCatAnim("idle"),950); }
    }
    setTimeout(()=>{ if(markCatTouch) markCatTouch(false); },50);
  },[doFistBump,markCatTouch]);

  useEffect(()=>{
    const el=catRef.current; if(!el) return;
    el.addEventListener("touchstart",onCatTouchStart,{passive:true});
    el.addEventListener("touchmove",onCatTouchMove,{passive:false});
    el.addEventListener("touchend",onCatTouchEnd,{passive:true});
    return()=>{ el.removeEventListener("touchstart",onCatTouchStart); el.removeEventListener("touchmove",onCatTouchMove); el.removeEventListener("touchend",onCatTouchEnd); };
  },[onCatTouchStart,onCatTouchMove,onCatTouchEnd]);

  const catAnimCSS={
    idle:{transition:`transform 0.45s ${EASE.spring}`},
    bump:{transform:"scale(1.06) rotate(-1.5deg)",transition:`transform 0.1s ${EASE.snappy}`},
    sway:{animation:"sway 0.9s ease-in-out"},
    bounce:{animation:`catBounce 0.55s ${EASE.spring}`},
  }[catAnim]||{};

  return (
    <div style={{padding:"0 18px calc(100px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))"}}>
      <Particles trigger={particleTrigger} accentColor={theme.accent}/>

      {/* header */}
      <div style={{paddingTop:"calc(28px + env(safe-area-inset-top))",paddingBottom:18,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",gap:12}}>
        <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10.5,fontWeight:800,letterSpacing:2.5,textTransform:"uppercase",color:theme.accent,marginBottom:6,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5,opacity:0.85}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:12}}>🐾</span>FistPaw
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:27,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.15,letterSpacing:-0.5}}>
            {(()=>{
              const h=new Date().getHours();
              const greet=h<12?"Good morning":h<18?"Good afternoon":"Good evening";
              return `${greet}, ${userName||"friend"}`;
            })()}
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",marginTop:3,fontWeight:500}}>{DAYS[dayIndex]}, {new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"long",day:"numeric"})}</div>
        </div>

        {/* streak freeze badge — tap to see the breakdown popover */}
        <div style={{marginTop:2,flexShrink:0}}>
          <div ref={freezeBadgeRef}>
            <FreezeBadge remaining={stats.freezes ?? MAX_FREEZES} onClick={()=>setFreezePopoverOpen(v=>!v)}/>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {freezePopoverOpen && (
        <FreezePopover
          remaining={breakingFreezeIndex!==null ? (stats.freezes ?? MAX_FREEZES)+1 : (stats.freezes ?? MAX_FREEZES)}
          breakingIndex={breakingFreezeIndex}
          onBreakDone={()=>setBreakingFreezeIndex(null)}
          onClose={()=>setFreezePopoverOpen(false)}
          anchorRef={freezeBadgeRef}
        />
      )}


      {/* streak strip — quiet, supporting info */}
      <div style={{padding:"4px 4px 20px"}}>
        <StreakStrip streak={stats.streak} bumpedToday={bumpedToday} size="lg"/>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,marginTop:8}}>
          <Flame size={13} level={lv}/>
          <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:lv.color}}>{lv.label}</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.22)"}}>·</span>
          {(()=>{const nx=MILESTONES.find(m=>m>stats.streak);return nx?<span style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)"}}>{nx-stats.streak} to {nx}-day milestone</span>:<span style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)"}}>{stats.totalBumps} total bumps</span>;})()}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── SIGNATURE CAT CARD — framed like a collectible photo, not a flat rounded box ── */}
      <div style={{position:"relative",marginBottom:18}}>
        {/* ambient color wash behind the card */}
        <div style={{
          position:"absolute",inset:"-8%",borderRadius:32,
          background:`radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 30%,${theme.glow}33 0%,transparent 65%)`,
          filter:"blur(4px)",pointerEvents:"none",
        }}/>

        <div ref={catRef} style={{
          borderRadius:28,position:"relative",cursor:"pointer",
          background:`linear-gradient(155deg,${theme.card} 0%,#0a0a0d 100%)`,
          padding:"14px 14px 18px",
          boxShadow:`0 24px 60px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.75), 0 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06) inset, 0 0 0 1px ${theme.accent}22`,
          ...catAnimCSS,
        }}
          onMouseDown={()=>{longTimer.current=setTimeout(()=>{setCatAnim("sway");audio.current?.purr();haptic.light();showHint("😻 Purring...");setTimeout(()=>setCatAnim("idle"),1200);},600);}}
          onMouseUp={()=>clearTimeout(longTimer.current)}
          onClick={e=>{const now2=Date.now();if(now2-dblTime.current<350){dblTime.current=0;setCatAnim("sway");audio.current?.purr();haptic.light();showHint("😸 Petted!");setTimeout(()=>setCatAnim("idle"),900);}else{dblTime.current=now2;const rect=e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();setTimeout(()=>{if(dblTime.current!==0)doFistBump(rect.left+rect.width/2,rect.top+rect.height/2);},360);}}}
        >
          {/* corner day label — like a card's collector number */}
          <div style={{
            position:"absolute",top:26,left:26,zIndex:2,
            display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,
            background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.45)",backdropFilter:"blur(8px)",
            borderRadius:12,padding:"5px 10px",
            border:`1px solid ${theme.accent}44`,
          }}>
            <span style={{width:6,height:6,borderRadius:"50%",background:theme.accent,boxShadow:`0 0 6px ${theme.glow}`}}/>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{DAYS[dayIndex].slice(0,3)}</span>
          </div>

          {/* photo — inset like it sits inside a frame/mat */}
          <div style={{
            borderRadius:18,overflow:"hidden",position:"relative",
            boxShadow:"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5) inset, 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
          }}>
            <img src={catImg} alt={`${DAYS[dayIndex]} fist bump cat`} style={{width:"100%",display:"block",userSelect:"none",pointerEvents:"none",transition:"filter 0.3s",filter:bumping?"brightness(1.14) saturate(1.2)":"none"}} draggable={false}/>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:0,left:0,right:0,background:"linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.55))",padding:"30px 16px 12px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:6}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:13}}>👊</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:11.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.7)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:0.2}}>Tap · Double-tap to pet · Long-press to purr</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* card footer — like a caption beneath a polaroid */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"12px 6px 2px"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:11.5,fontWeight:700,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.4)",letterSpacing:0.3}}>
              {DAYS[dayIndex]}'s Cat
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:4}}>
              <Flame size={13} level={lv}/>
              <span style={{fontSize:11.5,fontWeight:800,color:lv.color}}>{stats.streak}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {showMsg&&message&&<div style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",backdropFilter:"blur(14px)",borderRadius:18,padding:"13px 16px",marginBottom:12,border:`1px solid ${theme.accent}2a`,animation:"msgIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)",display:"flex",alignItems:"flex-start",gap:10}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:18,flexShrink:0,marginTop:1}}>🐱</span>
        <span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.45}}>"{message}"</span>
      </div>}


      {bumpedToday&&<div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${theme.accent}15,transparent)`,border:`1px solid ${theme.accent}2a`,borderRadius:16,padding:"12px 15px",marginBottom:14,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:16}}>✓</span>
        <div><div style={{fontSize:12.5,fontWeight:700,color:theme.accent}}>Today's streak saved</div><div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.28)",marginTop:1}}>Keep bumping anytime · come back tomorrow</div></div>
      </div>}

      {/* main bump */}
      <PressBtn hapticType="bump" onClick={e=>{const rect=e?.currentTarget?.getBoundingClientRect?.();doFistBump(rect?rect.left+rect.width/2:window.innerWidth/2,rect?rect.top+rect.height/2:window.innerHeight/2);}} disabled={bumping}
        style={{
          width:"100%",
          background:`linear-gradient(160deg,${theme.accent} 0%,${theme.glow} 100%)`,
          borderRadius:20,padding:"19px",fontSize:17,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",textAlign:"center",
          boxShadow:`0 10px 30px -6px ${theme.glow}77, 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.25) inset`,
          marginBottom:10,letterSpacing:0.3,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:9,
        }}>
        <IconFist size={20} color="#fff"/>{bumpedToday?"Bump again":"Fist Bump"}
      </PressBtn>

      {/* emergency */}
      <PressBtn hapticType="medium" onClick={onEmergency}
        style={{width:"100%",background:"rgba(239,68,68,0.08)",border:"1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.18)",borderRadius:16,padding:"13px",fontSize:12.5,fontWeight:700,color:"#f87171",textAlign:"center",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:7}}>
        <IconSiren size={15} color="#f87171"/>Emergency fist bump
      </PressBtn>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── SETTINGS ROW ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function SettingsRow({icon, label, sub, onClick, danger, trailing}) {
  return (
    <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onClick} style={{
      width:"100%",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:13,
      background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
      borderRadius:16,padding:"14px 15px",textAlign:"left",
    }}>
      <div style={{
        width:38,height:38,borderRadius:11,flexShrink:0,
        display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18,
        background: danger ? "rgba(239,68,68,0.12)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
      }}>{icon}</div>
      <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:13.5,fontWeight:700,color:danger?"#f87171":"#fff"}}>{label}</div>
        {sub && <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)",marginTop:1}}>{sub}</div>}
      </div>
      {trailing}
    </PressBtn>
  );
}

// ── TOGGLE SWITCH ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function Toggle({on, onChange, color}) {
  return (
    <div
      onClick={(e)=>{ e.stopPropagation(); haptic.light(); onChange(!on); }}
      style={{
        width:44,height:26,borderRadius:13,padding:3,flexShrink:0,cursor:"pointer",
        background: on ? color : "rgba(255,255,255,0.12)",
        transition:`background 0.25s ${EASE.standard}`,
      }}
    >
      <div style={{
        width:20,height:20,borderRadius:10,background:"#fff",
