        transform:`translateX(${on?18:0}px)`,
        transition:`transform 0.25s ${EASE.spring}`,
        boxShadow:"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
      }}/>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── RESET CONFIRM MODAL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function ResetConfirmModal({onClose, onConfirm}) {
  return (
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:400,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.85)",backdropFilter:"blur(16px)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",padding:24}}
      onClick={onClose}>
      <div onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()} style={{
        maxWidth:320,width:"100%",background:"#1a0a0a",borderRadius:26,padding:"28px 24px",
        border:"1.5px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.4)",textAlign:"center",
        animation:"mileIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)",
      }}>
        <div style={{fontSize:44,marginBottom:14}}>⚠️</div>
        <h2 style={{fontSize:19,fontWeight:900,color:"#f87171",margin:"0 0 8px"}}>Reset all progress?</h2>
        <p style={{fontSize:13,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)",lineHeight:1.6,marginBottom:24}}>
          This clears your streak, total bumps, and achievements for good. Your name stays saved.
        </p>
        <PressBtn hapticType="heavy" onClick={onConfirm} style={{
          width:"100%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,#dc2626)",
          borderRadius:16,padding:"14px",textAlign:"center",fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:8,
        }}>Yes, reset everything</PressBtn>
        <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onClose} style={{
          width:"100%",background:"transparent",borderRadius:16,padding:"11px",
          textAlign:"center",fontSize:13,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)",
        }}>Cancel</PressBtn>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── SETTINGS CONTENT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function SettingsContent({theme, userName, userAvatar, onEditName, onEditAvatar, stats, setStats, onResetProgress, onClose}) {
  const [soundOn,setSoundOn]=useLS("fp16_sound",true);
  const [hapticsOn,setHapticsOn]=useLS("fp16_haptics",true);
  const [reducedMotion,setReducedMotion]=useLS("fp16_reducedmotion",false);
  const avatar = userAvatar || DEFAULT_AVATAR;

  return (
    <div style={{
      position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:350,
      background:`linear-gradient(160deg,${theme.bg[0]} 0%,${theme.bg[1]} 55%,${theme.bg[2]} 100%)`,
      overflowY:"auto",
      animation:`settingsSlideIn 0.35s ${EASE.springSoft}`,
    }}>
      <style>{`
        @keyframes settingsSlideIn{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px) scale(0.98)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}
      `}</style>
      <div style={{padding:"calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-top)) 20px calc(60px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))",maxWidth:480,margin:"0 auto"}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:12,marginBottom:26}}>
          <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onClose} style={{
            width:38,height:38,borderRadius:12,flexShrink:0,
            display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
            background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
          }}>
            <IconBack size={18}/>
          </PressBtn>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10.5,fontWeight:800,letterSpacing:2.5,textTransform:"uppercase",color:theme.accent,opacity:0.85}}>Preferences</div>
            <h2 style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",margin:0,letterSpacing:-0.5}}>Settings</h2>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* profile card — tap the avatar to change it */}
        <div style={{
          background:`linear-gradient(155deg,${theme.card} 0%,#0a0a0d 100%)`,borderRadius:22,
          padding:"18px 18px",marginBottom:20,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:14,
          boxShadow:"0 12px 30px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)",
        }}>
          <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onEditAvatar} style={{
            width:52,height:52,borderRadius:16,flexShrink:0,fontSize:26,
            display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
            background: avatar.type==="photo" ? "transparent" : `linear-gradient(135deg,${theme.accent},${theme.glow})`,
            overflow:"hidden",
          }}>
            {avatar.type==="photo"
              ? <img src={avatar.value} alt="Your avatar" style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover"}}/>
              : avatar.value}
          </PressBtn>
          <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>{userName||"friend"}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)",marginTop:1}}>Tap your avatar or the rows below to make changes</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:10}}>Profile</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8,marginBottom:24}}>
          <SettingsRow icon="✏️" label="Edit name" sub={`Currently "${userName||"friend"}"`} onClick={onEditName}
            trailing={<span style={{fontSize:16,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"}}>›</span>}/>
          <SettingsRow icon={avatar.type==="photo" ? "🖼️" : avatar.value} label="Edit avatar" sub="Choose a cat or upload your own photo" onClick={onEditAvatar}
            trailing={<span style={{fontSize:16,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"}}>›</span>}/>
        </div>

        <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:10}}>Experience</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8,marginBottom:24}}>
          <SettingsRow icon="🔊" label="Sound effects" sub="Meows, chirps, and bump sounds"
            onClick={()=>setSoundOn(v=>!v)}
            trailing={<Toggle on={soundOn} onChange={setSoundOn} color={theme.accent}/>}/>
          <SettingsRow icon="📳" label="Vibration" sub="Haptic feedback on taps and bumps"
            onClick={()=>setHapticsOn(v=>!v)}
            trailing={<Toggle on={hapticsOn} onChange={setHapticsOn} color={theme.accent}/>}/>
          <SettingsRow icon="🌊" label="Reduced motion" sub="Calmer animations, fewer particles"
            onClick={()=>setReducedMotion(v=>!v)}
            trailing={<Toggle on={reducedMotion} onChange={setReducedMotion} color={theme.accent}/>}/>
        </div>

        <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:10}}>Data</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8,marginBottom:24}}>
          <SettingsRow icon="⚠️" label="Reset all progress" sub="Clears streak, bumps, and achievements" danger onClick={onResetProgress}
            trailing={<span style={{fontSize:16,color:"rgba(239,68,68,0.4)"}}>›</span>}/>
        </div>

        <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginTop:32,opacity:0.3}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#fff",fontWeight:700}}>FistPaw</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#fff",marginTop:2}}>One fist bump a day 🐾</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── STATS CONTENT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function StatsContent({stats,theme,onOpenSettings}) {
  const lv=getLevel(stats.streak);
  const wk=["Su","Mo","Tu","We","Th","Fr","Sa"];
  const bumpedToday = stats.lastBumpDay === new Date().toDateString();
  return (
    <div style={{padding:"calc(30px + env(safe-area-inset-top)) 20px calc(100px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))"}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:22}}>
        <div>
          <div style={{fontSize:10.5,fontWeight:800,letterSpacing:2.5,textTransform:"uppercase",color:theme.accent,marginBottom:6,opacity:0.85}}>Overview</div>
          <h2 style={{fontSize:24,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",margin:0,letterSpacing:-0.5}}>Your Stats</h2>
        </div>
        <PressBtn hapticType="light" onClick={onOpenSettings} style={{
          width:40,height:40,borderRadius:13,flexShrink:0,marginTop:2,
          display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
          background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
        }}>
          <IconSettings size={20} active={false} color="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)"/>
        </PressBtn>
      </div>

      <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(155deg,${theme.card} 0%,#0a0a0d 100%)`,borderRadius:24,padding:"22px 20px",marginBottom:14,boxShadow:`0 16px 40px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 0 1px ${lv.color}22`}}>
        <StreakStrip streak={stats.streak} bumpedToday={bumpedToday} size="lg"/>
        <div style={{marginTop:16,paddingTop:16,borderTop:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>Current level</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:7,marginBottom:5}}><Flame size={20} level={lv}/><span style={{fontSize:19,fontWeight:900,color:lv.color}}>{lv.label}</span></div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)"}}>Best streak <span style={{color:"#fbbf24",fontWeight:700}}>{stats.bestStreak} days</span></div>
        </div>
        <div style={{marginTop:18}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:6}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)",fontWeight:600}}>Level progress</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:lv.color,fontWeight:700}}>{lv.max===Infinity?"MAX":`${stats.streak-lv.min} / ${lv.max-lv.min+1}`}</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{height:5,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{height:"100%",borderRadius:3,background:`linear-gradient(90deg,${lv.gradient[0]},${lv.gradient[1]})`,width:`${lv.max===Infinity?100:Math.min(100,(stats.streak-lv.min)/Math.max(1,lv.max-lv.min)*100)}%`,transition:"width 0.7s ease",boxShadow:`0 0 6px ${lv.glow}`}}/>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:14}}>
        {[{label:"Total bumps",val:stats.totalBumps,icon:"👊",color:theme.accent},{label:"Best streak",val:stats.bestStreak,icon:<IconTrophy size={20}/>,color:"#fbbf24"},{label:"This week",val:stats.weekBumps,icon:"📅",color:"#34d399"},{label:"Emergency",val:stats.usedEmergency?"Used":"—",icon:"🚨",color:"#f87171"}].map(({label,val,icon,color},i)=>(
          <div key={label} style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",borderRadius:16,padding:"15px 16px",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",animation:`cardStagger 0.45s ${EASE.decelerate} both`,animationDelay:`${i*0.05}s`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:19,opacity:0.9}}>{icon}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:23,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginTop:7,letterSpacing:-0.5}}>{val}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)",fontWeight:500,marginTop:1}}>{label}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",borderRadius:20,padding:17,marginBottom:14,border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:14}}>This week</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
          {wk.map((d,i)=>{const b=stats.weekHistory?.[i];return(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:5,flex:1}}>
              <div style={{width:"100%",aspectRatio:"1",borderRadius:10,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",background:b?`linear-gradient(145deg,${theme.accent},${theme.glow})`:"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",boxShadow:b?`0 4px 14px -4px ${theme.glow}66`:"none",transition:"all 0.3s",fontSize:13}}>{b?"🐾":""}</div>
              <span style={{fontSize:9.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.28)",fontWeight:600}}>{d}</span>
            </div>
          );})}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",borderRadius:20,padding:17,marginBottom:14,border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:14}}>Streak levels</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:6}}>
          {STREAK_LEVELS.map((l,i)=>{const active=stats.streak>=l.min&&stats.streak<=l.max;return(
            <div key={i} style={{
              display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:11,
              padding:"8px 10px",borderRadius:12,
              background: active ? `linear-gradient(90deg, ${l.gradient[0]}22, ${l.gradient[1]}0a)` : "transparent",
              border: active ? `1px solid ${l.color}33` : "1px solid transparent",
              opacity:active?1:0.5,
              transition:"all 0.3s",
            }}>
              <Flame size={17} level={l}/>
              <span style={{fontSize:12,color:active?l.color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.4)",fontWeight:active?800:500,flex:1}}>{l.label}</span>
              <span style={{
                fontSize:9,color:active?l.color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.25)",fontWeight:700,
                background: active ? `${l.color}18` : "transparent",
                borderRadius:6, padding: active ? "2px 6px" : "0",
              }}>{l.min===0?"0":l.max===Infinity?`${l.min}+`:`${l.min}–${l.max}`}</span>
              {active&&<IconShieldCheck size={14} color={l.color}/>}
            </div>
          );})}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.2,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Achievements</div>
        {(()=>{
          const unlockedCount = ACHIEVEMENTS.filter(a=>a.req(stats)).length;
          return (
            <div style={{
              fontSize:10.5,fontWeight:800,color:theme.accent,
              background:`${theme.accent}18`,border:`1px solid ${theme.accent}33`,
              borderRadius:8,padding:"3px 8px",
            }}>{unlockedCount}/{ACHIEVEMENTS.length}</div>
          );
        })()}
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8,paddingBottom:20}}>
        {ACHIEVEMENTS.map((a,i)=><AchCard key={a.id} ach={a} unlocked={a.req(stats)} index={i} stats={stats}/>)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── MAIN APP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export default function FistPaw() {
  const now=new Date();
  const dayIndex=now.getDay();
  const theme=DAY_THEMES[dayIndex];
  const catImg=CAT_IMAGES[dayIndex];

  const [onboarded,setOnboarded]=useLS("fp16_onboarded",false);
  const [userName,setUserName]=useLS("fp16_username","");
  const [userAvatar,setUserAvatar]=useLS("fp16_avatar",DEFAULT_AVATAR);
  const [stats,setStats]=useLS("fp16_stats",{streak:0,bestStreak:0,totalBumps:0,weekBumps:0,weekHistory:Array(7).fill(false),lastBumpDay:null,usedEmergency:false,freezes:MAX_FREEZES,freezesUsedTotal:0});
  const [emergencyOpen,setEmergencyOpen]=useState(false);
  const [editNameOpen,setEditNameOpen]=useState(false);
  const [editAvatarOpen,setEditAvatarOpen]=useState(false);
  const [settingsOpen,setSettingsOpen]=useState(false);
  const [resetConfirmOpen,setResetConfirmOpen]=useState(false);
  const [activeTab,setActiveTab]=useLS("fp16_tab",0);

  // Top-level popup state — rendered OUTSIDE the transformed sliding container
  // so position:fixed centers correctly on the real viewport, not the 200%-wide panel.
  const [hint,setHint]=useState("");
  const hintTimerRef=useRef(null);
  const [milestone,setMilestone]=useState(null);
  const [newAch,setNewAch]=useState(null);

  // Auto-dismiss top toasts after a few seconds — tap/close still works immediately,
  // this just means the person doesn't HAVE to interact if they're mid-bump-streak-euphoria.
  useEffect(()=>{ if(!milestone) return; const t=setTimeout(()=>setMilestone(null),4200); return()=>clearTimeout(t); },[milestone]);
  useEffect(()=>{ if(!newAch) return; const t=setTimeout(()=>setNewAch(null),4200); return()=>clearTimeout(t); },[newAch]);

  const showHintTop=useCallback((txt)=>{
    clearTimeout(hintTimerRef.current);
    setHint(txt);
    hintTimerRef.current=setTimeout(()=>setHint(""),1800);
  },[]);

  const audio=useRef(null);
  useEffect(()=>{audio.current=buildAudio();},[]);

  const TAB_COUNT = 2; // Home, Stats — Settings is an overlay opened from Stats, not a swipe tab
  const panelPct = 100 / TAB_COUNT; // width % of each panel within the sliding strip

  const goTo=useCallback((idx)=>{
    if(idx===activeTab||idx<0||idx>=TAB_COUNT) return;
    setActiveTab(idx);
    haptic.swipe();
    audio.current?.swipe();
  },[activeTab,setActiveTab]);

  // ── LIVE DRAG-TRACKING SWIPE — panel follows the finger 1:1 in real time ──
  const outerRef=useRef(null);
  const isOnCat=useRef(false);
  const dragRef=useRef(null); // {startX, startY, lastX, width, dragging}
  const [dragPct,setDragPct]=useState(null); // null = not dragging; number = live offset %

  const markCatTouch=useCallback((on=true)=>{isOnCat.current=on;},[]);

  const handleOuterTouchStart=useCallback(e=>{
    isOnCat.current=false;
    const el=outerRef.current;
    dragRef.current={
      startX:e.touches[0].clientX, startY:e.touches[0].clientY,
      lastX:e.touches[0].clientX,
      width: el ? el.offsetWidth : window.innerWidth,
      dragging:false,
    };
  },[]);

  const handleOuterTouchMove=useCallback(e=>{
    if(isOnCat.current||!dragRef.current) return;
    const d=dragRef.current;
    const dx=e.touches[0].clientX-d.startX;
    const dy=Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientY-d.startY);
    d.lastX=e.touches[0].clientX;

    if(!d.dragging){
      // decide gesture direction once, early
      if(Math.abs(dx)>8 && Math.abs(dx)>dy){
        d.dragging=true;
      } else if(dy>8){
        dragRef.current=null; // vertical scroll — hand off to native scroll entirely
        return;
      } else {
        return; // not enough movement yet to decide
      }
    }
    if(d.dragging){
      e.preventDefault();
      // convert px offset to a percentage of one panel's width, clamped so you
      // can't drag past the immediately adjacent page's resting position
      const pct = (dx / d.width) * panelPct;
      const base = -activeTab * panelPct;
      let next = base + pct;
      next = Math.max(-(TAB_COUNT-1)*panelPct, Math.min(0, next));
      setDragPct(next);
    }
  },[activeTab,panelPct]);

  const handleOuterTouchEnd=useCallback(e=>{
    if(isOnCat.current||!dragRef.current){ dragRef.current=null; return; }
    const d=dragRef.current;
    dragRef.current=null;
    if(!d.dragging){ setDragPct(null); return; }

    const dx=e.changedTouches[0].clientX-d.startX;
    const threshold=d.width*0.22; // ~22% of panel width commits the swipe
    let target=activeTab;
    if(dx<-threshold) target=Math.min(TAB_COUNT-1,activeTab+1);
    else if(dx>threshold) target=Math.max(0,activeTab-1);
    // else: snap back to wherever we started

    setDragPct(null); // release live tracking — let CSS transition take over for the settle
    if(target!==activeTab) goTo(target);
  },[activeTab,goTo]);

  useEffect(()=>{
    const el=outerRef.current; if(!el) return;
    el.addEventListener("touchstart",handleOuterTouchStart,{passive:true});
    el.addEventListener("touchmove",handleOuterTouchMove,{passive:false});
    el.addEventListener("touchend",handleOuterTouchEnd,{passive:true});
    el.addEventListener("touchcancel",handleOuterTouchEnd,{passive:true});
    return()=>{
      el.removeEventListener("touchstart",handleOuterTouchStart);
      el.removeEventListener("touchmove",handleOuterTouchMove);
      el.removeEventListener("touchend",handleOuterTouchEnd);
      el.removeEventListener("touchcancel",handleOuterTouchEnd);
    };
  },[handleOuterTouchStart,handleOuterTouchMove,handleOuterTouchEnd]);

  // While dragging: no transition, follow finger exactly.
  // Not dragging: smooth eased settle to the resting position.
  const restingPct = -activeTab * panelPct;
  const livePct = dragPct!==null ? dragPct : restingPct;

  if(!onboarded) return <Onboarding onDone={(name,avatar)=>{ haptic.success(); setUserName(name); setUserAvatar(avatar); setOnboarded(true); }}/>;

  return (
    <div ref={outerRef} style={{width:"100%",height:"100vh",overflow:"hidden",position:"relative",
      background:`linear-gradient(160deg,${theme.bg[0]} 0%,${theme.bg[1]} 55%,${theme.bg[2]} 100%)`,
      fontFamily:"system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif",touchAction:"pan-y"}}>
      <style>{`
        @keyframes bIn{0%{transform:scale(0.3);opacity:0}70%{transform:scale(1.12)}100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
        @keyframes sway{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0)}25%{transform:rotate(-3deg) scale(1.04)}75%{transform:rotate(3deg) scale(1.04)}}
        @keyframes catBounce{0%{transform:translateY(0)}40%{transform:translateY(-20px) scale(1.06)}70%{transform:translateY(-7px)}100%{transform:translateY(0)}}
        @keyframes msgIn{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px) scale(0.98)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}
        @keyframes mileIn{0%{transform:scale(0.4) translateY(40px);opacity:0}70%{transform:scale(1.05) translateY(-5px)}100%{transform:scale(1) translateY(0);opacity:1}}
        @keyframes floatOrb{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}50%{transform:translateY(-16px) scale(1.04)}}
        @keyframes hintFade{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-6px) scale(0.95)}20%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}80%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:0}}
        @keyframes gentlePulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:0.9}50%{transform:scale(1.08);opacity:1}}
        @keyframes cardStagger{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px) scale(0.97)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}
        /* ── Streak freeze shatter sequence ── */
        @keyframes freezeCrack{
          0%{transform:scale(1);filter:brightness(1)}
          15%{transform:scale(1.35);filter:brightness(2.2)}
          35%{transform:scale(1.15);filter:brightness(1.6)}
          100%{transform:scale(1);filter:brightness(1)}
        }
        @keyframes freezeRingBurst{
          0%{r:3;stroke-width:2.5;opacity:0.9}
          100%{r:11;stroke-width:0;opacity:0}
        }
        @keyframes freezeShardFly{
          0%{transform:translate(0,0) rotate(0deg);opacity:0.9}
          100%{transform:translate(var(--shard-dx),var(--shard-dy)) rotate(var(--shard-rot));opacity:0}
        }
        @keyframes popoverIn{
          0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-8px) scale(0.94)}
          100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}
        }
        *{box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
        /* Disable text selection app-wide — this is a native-feeling app, not a
           document, so accidental long-press text selection shouldn't happen.
           Explicitly re-enable it ONLY for real text inputs so typing still works normally. */
        *{
          -webkit-user-select:none; -moz-user-select:none; user-select:none;
        }
        input, textarea {
          -webkit-user-select:text; -moz-user-select:text; user-select:text;
        }
        html,body{overscroll-behavior:none;color-scheme:dark;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:0}
      `}</style>

      {[[85,2,340,0,"accent"],[5,32,200,1.6,"glow"],[60,68,260,2.3,"accent"],[15,88,160,0.9,"glow"]].map(([x,y,sz,dl,c],i)=>(
        <div key={i} style={{position:"absolute",left:`${x}%`,top:`${y}%`,width:sz,height:sz,borderRadius:"50%",pointerEvents:"none",filter:"blur(2px)",background:`radial-gradient(circle,${c==="accent"?theme.accent:theme.glow}26 0%,transparent 70%)`,animation:`floatOrb ${4+dl}s ease-in-out infinite`,animationDelay:`${dl}s`}}/>
      ))}

      {/* sliding panels — 1:1 finger tracking while dragging, eased settle otherwise.
          Each panel gets a subtle parallax scale/fade based on its own distance from
          the current scroll position, matching the depth cue iOS uses on push/pop transitions. */}
      {(() => {
        const settling = dragPct===null;
        const panelTransition = settling
          ? `transform 0.32s ${EASE.springSoft}, opacity 0.32s ${EASE.standard}`
          : "none";
        // distance (in panel-widths) of each panel from the current scroll offset —
        // 0 = fully centered/active, 1 = one full panel away (off to the side)
        const dist = (panelIndex) => Math.min(1, Math.abs((-livePct/panelPct) - panelIndex));
        const scaleFor = (panelIndex) => 1 - dist(panelIndex)*0.04;
        const opacityFor = (panelIndex) => 1 - dist(panelIndex)*0.55;

        const panels = [
          <HomeContent key="home"
            stats={stats} setStats={setStats} theme={theme} dayIndex={dayIndex} catImg={catImg}
            onEmergency={()=>setEmergencyOpen(true)}
            markCatTouch={markCatTouch}
            onHint={showHintTop}
            onMilestone={setMilestone}
            onAchievement={setNewAch}
            userName={userName}
            userAvatar={userAvatar}
          />,
          <StatsContent key="stats" stats={stats} theme={theme} onOpenSettings={()=>setSettingsOpen(true)}/>,
        ];

        return (
          <div style={{
            display:"flex",width:`${TAB_COUNT*100}%`,height:"100%",
            transform:`translateX(${livePct}%)`,
            transition: panelTransition,
            willChange:"transform",
          }}>
            {panels.map((panel,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{
                width:`${panelPct}%`,height:"100%",overflowY:"auto",flexShrink:0,
                overscrollBehaviorY:"contain",
                transform:`scale(${scaleFor(i)})`, opacity:opacityFor(i),
                transition:panelTransition, transformOrigin:"center top",
              }}>
                {panel}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        );
      })()}

      {/* ── TOP-LEVEL POPUPS — true viewport-fixed, rendered as siblings of the transformed panel ── */}
      {hint&&(
        <div style={{position:"fixed",top:80,left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.8)",backdropFilter:"blur(10px)",borderRadius:20,padding:"9px 20px",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",zIndex:600,animation:"hintFade 1.8s ease forwards",whiteSpace:"nowrap",pointerEvents:"none"}}>
          {hint}
        </div>
      )}

      {milestone&&(
        <div style={{
          position:"fixed",top:"calc(56px + env(safe-area-inset-top))",left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",zIndex:600,
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(14,14,20,0.97), ${theme.glow}22)`,
          backdropFilter:"blur(16px)",
          border:`1px solid ${theme.accent}55`,borderRadius:20,padding:"16px 20px",
          display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:13,
          animation:"msgIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)",
          boxShadow:`0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 0 24px -6px ${theme.glow}66`,
          minWidth:270,maxWidth:330,cursor:"pointer",
        }} onClick={()=>{ haptic.light(); setMilestone(null); }}>
          <div style={{
            width:48,height:48,borderRadius:14,flexShrink:0,fontSize:24,
            display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
            background:`linear-gradient(155deg, ${theme.accent}, ${theme.glow})`,
            boxShadow:`0 0 16px ${theme.glow}77, inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3)`,
          }}>🏆</div>
          <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:9.5,fontWeight:800,letterSpacing:0.8,textTransform:"uppercase",color:theme.accent,marginBottom:2}}>
              Milestone unlocked
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.1}}>{milestone} Day Streak!</div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={(e)=>{ e.stopPropagation(); haptic.light(); setMilestone(null); }} style={{background:"none",border:"none",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.25)",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:20,lineHeight:1,padding:"2px 4px",flexShrink:0}}>×</button>
        </div>
      )}

      {newAch&&(()=>{
        const tier = ACH_TIERS[newAch.tier] || ACH_TIERS.bronze;
        return (
          <div style={{
            position:"fixed",top:"calc(56px + env(safe-area-inset-top))",left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",
            background:`linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(14,14,20,0.97), ${tier.gradient[0]}22)`,
            backdropFilter:"blur(16px)",
            border:`1px solid ${tier.color}55`,borderRadius:20,padding:"14px 18px",zIndex:600,
            display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:13,
            animation:"msgIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)",
            boxShadow:`0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 0 20px -6px ${tier.glow}55`,
            minWidth:270,maxWidth:330,
          }}>
            <div style={{
              width:44,height:44,borderRadius:13,flexShrink:0,fontSize:22,
              display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
              background:`linear-gradient(155deg, ${tier.gradient[1]}, ${tier.gradient[0]})`,
              boxShadow:`0 0 14px ${tier.glow}66, inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3)`,
            }}>{ACH_EMOJI[newAch.id]}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9.5,fontWeight:800,letterSpacing:0.8,textTransform:"uppercase",color:tier.color,marginBottom:2}}>
                {tier.label} achievement unlocked
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:13.5,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:1}}>{newAch.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.45)"}}>{newAch.desc}</div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>{ haptic.light(); setNewAch(null); }} style={{background:"none",border:"none",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.25)",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:20,lineHeight:1,padding:"2px 4px",flexShrink:0}}>×</button>
          </div>
        );
      })()}

      {/* ── EMERGENCY MODAL — top-level, viewport-fixed ── */}
      {emergencyOpen&&(
        <EmergencyModal
          onClose={()=>setEmergencyOpen(false)}
          onBump={()=>{
            const now2=new Date(); const todayKey=now2.toDateString(); const yestKey=new Date(Date.now()-86400000).toDateString();
            const { newStreak, newFreezes, freezeUsed } = computeStreakUpdate(stats, todayKey, yestKey);
            const bumpedToday=stats.lastBumpDay===todayKey;
            const newWH=[...(stats.weekHistory||Array(7).fill(false))]; newWH[dayIndex]=true;
            setStats({...stats,streak:newStreak,freezes:newFreezes,bestStreak:Math.max(stats.bestStreak,newStreak),totalBumps:stats.totalBumps+1,weekBumps:!bumpedToday?stats.weekBumps+1:stats.weekBumps,weekHistory:newWH,lastBumpDay:todayKey,usedEmergency:true,freezesUsedTotal:(stats.freezesUsedTotal||0)+(freezeUsed?1:0)});
          }}
          theme={theme}
        />
      )}

      {/* ── SETTINGS OVERLAY — opened from the gear icon on Stats ── */}
      {settingsOpen&&(
        <SettingsContent
          theme={theme}
          userName={userName}
          userAvatar={userAvatar}
          onEditName={()=>setEditNameOpen(true)}
          onEditAvatar={()=>setEditAvatarOpen(true)}
          stats={stats}
          setStats={setStats}
          onResetProgress={()=>setResetConfirmOpen(true)}
          onClose={()=>setSettingsOpen(false)}
        />
      )}

      {/* ── EDIT NAME — reuses the exact same NameEntry screen as onboarding ── */}
      {editNameOpen&&(
        <NameEntry
          theme={theme}
          initialName={userName}
          onCancel={()=>setEditNameOpen(false)}
          onContinue={(newName)=>{ setUserName(newName); setEditNameOpen(false); }}
        />
      )}

      {/* ── EDIT AVATAR — reuses the exact same AvatarPicker screen as onboarding ── */}
      {editAvatarOpen&&(
        <AvatarPicker
          userName={userName}
          initialAvatar={userAvatar}
          onCancel={()=>setEditAvatarOpen(false)}
          onContinue={(newAvatar)=>{ setUserAvatar(newAvatar); setEditAvatarOpen(false); }}
        />
      )}

      {/* ── RESET CONFIRM MODAL — top-level ── */}
      {resetConfirmOpen&&(
        <ResetConfirmModal
          onClose={()=>setResetConfirmOpen(false)}
          onConfirm={()=>{
            setStats({streak:0,bestStreak:0,totalBumps:0,weekBumps:0,weekHistory:Array(7).fill(false),lastBumpDay:null,usedEmergency:false,freezes:MAX_FREEZES,freezesUsedTotal:0});
            setResetConfirmOpen(false);
            haptic.success();
          }}
        />
      )}

      {/* bottom nav */}
      <div style={{
        position:"fixed",bottom:0,left:0,right:0,
        background:"linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(3,3,6,0.75) 0%,rgba(2,2,4,0.97) 40%)",
        backdropFilter:"blur(24px)",
        boxShadow:"0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06) inset, 0 -20px 40px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)",
        display:"flex",padding:"12px 20px calc(10px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))",zIndex:50,gap:6,
      }}>
        {[
          {id:0,label:"Home",icon:a=><IconHome size={22} active={a} color={a?theme.accent:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)"}/>},
          {id:1,label:"Stats",icon:a=><IconStats size={22} active={a} color={a?theme.accent:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)"}/>},
        ].map(t=>{
          const a=activeTab===t.id;
          return (
            <PressBtn key={t.id} hapticType="light" onClick={()=>goTo(t.id)}
              style={{
                flex:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:7,
                color:a?theme.accent:"rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",transition:"color 0.2s,background 0.25s",
                padding:"10px 0",borderRadius:16,
                background:a?`${theme.accent}14`:"transparent",
              }}>
              {t.icon(a)}
              <span style={{fontSize:12.5,fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:0.2}}>{t.label}</span>
            </PressBtn>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
